clean_body: Every signature sends a message | Trump’s team is pursuing a mail-in voting ban – putting the secure, accessible elections Americans rely on at risk. It’s a clear, coordinated effort to chip away at voting rights after Democrats scored major victories in November. Americans showed a clear display of disapproval of Trump’s agenda, so now he’s trying to silence us. New Dems are pushing back in Congress, but we need the support of grassroots Democrats like you to stand up to Trump. | Thank you, -New Dems –FORWARDED MESSAGE BELOW– After Democrats’ major victories this month, Donald Trump is doubling down on his anti-voter agenda! Trump is intimidated by the massive display of people-power in elections earlier this month in states like CA, NY, NJ, and VA! Voters showed up in record numbers in protest of his administration’s extreme far-right agenda and in favor of commonsense, unifying Democratic candidates. The White House has confirmed that they’re drafting a new executive order aiming to restrict voting, targeting Americans’ right to vote by mail. Thank you for using your voice! # [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120632019/586881377/1733485174?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWUzOTA3OGMtNmRkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nbx1MXSjdtqikvO3mwQtMXczHHLe1m0ReNOULVm5u44=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120632020/586881379/1733485174?refcode=em-12.4.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWUzOTA3OGMtNmRkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nbx1MXSjdtqikvO3mwQtMXczHHLe1m0ReNOULVm5u44=) Hi there, my name is Manpreet Kaur, and I serve as the Vice Mayor of Bakersfield. It is my honor to endorse Randy Villegas for Congress in California’s 22nd District. We in the Central Valley deserve leaders who understand our lived realities -- **and Randy is that person**. Randy and I went to high school across the street from one another -- he went to Golden Valley High School, and I went to Ridgeview High School. Randy’s story is all of our stories - kids of the Southern Central Valley who left for higher education but came right back to serve our neighborhoods. _Every child here in CA-22 deserves the same opportunity._
That’s the American Dream.
That’s the Central Valley story.
Randy’s story IS the Central Valley story because we know Randy.
Randy went to the same schools as we did, he was a community advocate standing right next to us. And folks, when our education is at risk... When our health care is at risk... when immigration, community safety, and opportunity are on the line -- I trust Randy to fight for the students of Ridgeview High School and Golden Valley High School. **So today, I’m proud to stand with Randy, and I'm so excited for us to send Randy to Congress to fight for the South Central Valley and for communities like my own.** **[If you believe every child in the Central Valley deserves a shot at the American Dream, just like Randy, then now’s the time to act. clean_body: | = = Hi there, my name is Manpreet Kaur, and I serve as the Vice Mayor of Bakersfield. It is my honor to endorse Randy Villegas for Congress in California’s 22nd District. We in the Central Valley deserve leaders who understand our lived realities -- and Randy is that person. Randy and I went to high school across the street from one another -- he went to Golden Valley High School, and I went to Ridgeview High School. Randy’s story is all of our stories - kids of the Southern Central Valley who left for higher education but came right back to serve our neighborhoods. Every child here in CA-22 deserves the same opportunity. That’s the American Dream. That’s the Central Valley story. Randy’s story IS the Central Valley story because we know Randy. Randy went to the same schools as we did, he was a community advocate standing right next to us. And folks, when our education is at risk... When our health care is at risk... when immigration, community safety, and opportunity are on the line -- I trust Randy to fight for the students of Ridgeview High School and Golden Valley High School. So today, I’m proud to stand with Randy, and I'm so excited for us to send Randy to Congress to fight for the South Central Valley and for communities like my own. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being part of this. Together, we can make history. Manpreet Kaur Vice Mayor, Bakersfield | = | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

name: Haley Stevens
subject: It might not seem like much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
$5. That's all.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1489%2E49239%2Ex8xBsB)

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9474?t=2&akid=1489%2E49239%2Ex8xBsB)
---
**$5.**
That's what I'm humbly asking you to **[chip in to my campaign](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9475?t=3&akid=1489%2E49239%2Ex8xBsB)** before midnight tonight.
| | [Chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9476?t=4&akid=1489%2E49239%2Ex8xBsB)
---
**$5** because I'm a lifelong Michigander who has spent my career fighting for our families, our small businesses, and our manufacturing economy. And I need your help to take this fight to the Senate.
**$5** because flipping the Senate blue is Democrats' best chance of keeping the Trump administration in check – and we simply can't do that if we lose here in Michigan.
**$5** because this race is on track to be one of the most competitive – and expensive – in the country. And I simply can't reach my critical fundraising goals without your help.
**I know it might not seem like much – but if everyone reading this chipped in $5, we'd get there in no time! That's the power of the grassroots movement we're building, null. It's made up of thousands of folks like you giving $5 when they can – and I really need you with me today.**
**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 – or anything at all – right now so we can keep Michigan blue and win a Democratic Senate majority next November?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9476?t=5&akid=1489%2E49239%2Ex8xBsB)**
| | | [Chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9476?t=6&akid=1489%2E49239%2Ex8xBsB)
---
| | [Chip in another amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9475?t=7&akid=1489%2E49239%2Ex8xBsB)
---
Thank you in advance for giving what you can. It means so much to have you with me in this fight.

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9477?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1489%2E49239%2Ex8xBsB) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9474?t=9&akid=1489%2E49239%2Ex8xBsB)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

subject: Georgia. Maine. Michigan. North Carolina.

body:
Do you know what the Senate races in these four states have in common?
#

**Cook Political Report has FOUR U.S. Senate races currently rated as TOSS UPS for 2026:** _Georgia. Maine. Michigan. North Carolina._
---

**Georgia’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Jon Ossoff** — _the most vulnerable Democrat in the 2026 midterm elections._ The GOP will undoubtedly do everything they can to win this seat back for a Republican. They’ll spend millions upon millions of dollars. They’ll come up with all sorts of outlandish attacks. Anything to solidify their majority in the Senate next year. **[DEFEND GEORGIA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98394?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U)**
---

**Maine’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Republican Susan Collins** — _the most vulnerable Republican in the 2026 midterm elections._ Cook Political Report recently UPGRADED this race from Leans Republican to TOSS UP, signaling that Democrats have a major opportunity to flip this seat. Now, we need to make sure we carry the momentum we've seen for Democrats in Maine + across the country all the way to next November. **[FLIP MAINE: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98394?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U)**
---

**Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Gary Peters,** who announced earlier this year that he will retire in 2026. _The good news is that Democrats currently hold every statewide seat in Michigan._ But defending this critical Democrat-held Senate seat won't be easy. _Last year, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race was one of the closest in the country._ So now, we can absolutely expect the GOP to go all-in to win this open seat. **[DEFEND MICHIGAN: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98394?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U)**
---

**North Carolina’s GOP-held U.S. Senate seat is one of Democrats’ top pick-up opportunities for 2026.** We have a strong Democratic candidate in former governor Roy Cooper, who has a record of winning + delivering for the people of North Carolina. _But outside groups are already pouring MILLIONS of dollars into this Senate race_ — a year away from the actual election! If this is any indication, the GOP will spend BIG to stop Democrats from flipping this Senate seat next year. **[FLIP NORTH CAROLINA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98394?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U)**
---

**Today, we’re asking for your help to defend the Democratic candidates running in all of these battleground elections and more, Peter.** **[Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help us take back the Senate in 2026? Giving right now, while it’s still early, could make an even bigger impact than it would next year!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98394?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98395?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=6&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98395?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=7&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98395?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98395?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98395?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98395?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98394?refcode=em20251204-9800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=9800%2E614464%2EAYQt0U)

name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: The Supreme Court Got It Wrong – We Must Keep Working To Make It Right
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Tonight, the Supreme Court stayed the ruling enjoining the use of the congressional map enacted in 2025 in the 2026 midterm elections in the case of LULAC v. Abbott.
The Supreme Court failed to reach the right result in its decision to stay the district court’s well-reasoned opinion enjoining the use of the congressional map Texas enacted in 2025 while the case of LULAC v. Abbott proceeds. The district court heard evidence on this map for nine days and found overwhelming, clear, and direct evidence of unconstitutional racial gerrymandering. The district court’s order to use the map Texas enacted in 2021—the congressional map currently in effect—while the case moves through the courts is the most practical and fair path forward at this time.
As Justice Kagan explained in her dissent, the order ‘disrespects the work of a District Court that did everything one could ask to carry out its charge—that put aside every consideration except getting the issue before it right...[and] disserves the millions of Texans whom the District Court found were assigned to their new districts based on their race. [T]his Court’s precedents and our Constitution demand better.’
The Texas map that the Supreme Court has now permitted to go into effect for the 2026 elections betrays the fundamental principle that all Texans should have a say in our government. I will continue to work to empower the citizens who are standing up for that principle in this case and elsewhere, and I will continue to work in all the ways I can to ensure that we have fair maps and fair representation in Texas.
And one of the ways we do that is by winning at the ballot box every single race we can next November. I’m completely committed to doing everything I can to make sure this racist redistricting plan backfires, and that Texas Democrats win back these seats and more.
Together we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

clean_body: ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [] Tonight, the Supreme Court stayed the ruling enjoining the use of the congressional map enacted in 2025 in the 2026 midterm elections in the case of LULAC v. Abbott. The Supreme Court failed to reach the right result in its decision to stay the district court’s well-reasoned opinion enjoining the use of the congressional map Texas enacted in 2025 while the case of LULAC v. Abbott proceeds. The district court heard evidence on this map for nine days and found overwhelming, clear, and direct evidence of unconstitutional racial gerrymandering. The district court’s order to use the map Texas enacted in 2021—the congressional map currently in effect—while the case moves through the courts is the most practical and fair path forward at this time. As Justice Kagan explained in her dissent, the order ‘disrespects the work of a District Court that did everything one could ask to carry out its charge—that put aside every consideration except getting the issue before it right...[and] disserves the millions of Texans whom the District Court found were assigned to their new districts based on their race. [T]his Court’s precedents and our Constitution demand better.’ The Texas map that the Supreme Court has now permitted to go into effect for the 2026 elections betrays the fundamental principle that all Texans should have a say in our government. I will continue to work to empower the citizens who are standing up for that principle in this case and elsewhere, and I will continue to work in all the ways I can to ensure that we have fair maps and fair representation in Texas. And one of the ways we do that is by winning at the ballot box every single race we can next November. I’m completely committed to doing everything I can to make sure this racist redistricting plan backfires, and that Texas Democrats win back these seats and more. Together we can do anything, Lizzie Signature [] DONATE [] VOLUNTEER [] 3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098 PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: www.lizziefletcher.com []

name: Roy Cooper
subject: The incompetence and cruelty coming from the Pentagon is staggering.
body:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=101%2E124072%2E5G2HDo)
Peter — I am disturbed by the apparent incompetence and cruelty of Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth who was confirmed by the Senate by only one vote. **[I believe we need a full investigation and accounting of Secretary Hegseth’s actions, and if these allegations are found to be true, he must resign.](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Hegseth/?source=em_RC_PET_RRHegseth_120425&t=7&akid=101%2E124072%2E5G2HDo)** It troubles me that this is only happening because NC Senator Thom Tillis changed his mind and voted to confirm Hegseth. I would have voted No, but we know that my opponent Michael Whatley would have voted Yes. Now, we’re dealing with the consequences. First, we learned earlier this year that Hegseth may have put U.S. service members’ lives at risk by sharing classified information in an unsecure messaging channel, a possibility confirmed this week by a Pentagon watchdog report. Then, Hegseth ordered that the real news organizations — the same ones that uncovered his Signalgate scandal — have their press passes revoked unless they agreed to clear all reporting through the Pentagon. That’s a clear violation of the independence of the press. Now, there’s reporting that Hegseth may have ordered a _second_ strike on a boat in the Caribbean in order to kill survivors. Let me be clear: We should commit as many resources as possible to stopping drug trafficking, but if that allegation is true, it would constitute a war crime. Every single one of these actions is beneath his position, and every one makes our country less safe. **[Peter, I’m personally asking you to sign my petition today to hold Secretary Hegseth and this administration accountable. We need to stand together on this. Click to add your name.](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Hegseth/?source=em_RC_PET_RRHegseth_120425&t=8&akid=101%2E124072%2E5G2HDo)** | [SIGN ON](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Hegseth/?source=em_RC_PET_RRHegseth_120425&t=9&akid=101%2E124072%2E5G2HDo)
---
Thank you,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Hegseth/?source=em_RC_PET_RRHegseth_120425&t=10&akid=101%2E124072%2E5G2HDo)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=101%2E124072%2E5G2HDo)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=101%2E124072%2E5G2HDo)

name: Team KTR Communications
subject: New Poll Shows KTR Leading GOP Primary for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA
body:
Poll Underscores Karrin’s Growing Momentum

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/karrinforarizona/clrpoll?e=ebfb0fda52)
---
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=450b24cb8d&e=ebfb0fda52)
| | | | | |
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** December 4th, 2025

**New Poll Shows Karrin Taylor Robson Leading GOP Primary for Governor** _Poll Underscores Karrin’s Growing Momentum With GOP Voters Statewide_
**PHOENIX, AZ** – A new statewide survey of likely Republican primary voters shows Karrin Taylor Robson leading the GOP race for Governor, underscoring the growing momentum behind her Trump-endorsed campaign.
The CivicLens Research [survey](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=0805a05630&e=ebfb0fda52) of 600 likely Republican primary voters places Robson in **first place with 37.2 percent** , ahead of Andy Biggs at 33.4 percent and David Schweikert at 4.8 percent, with 24.6 percent undecided. The poll was conducted November 24–26 among highly motivated GOP voters, 88.6 percent of whom said they are “extremely likely” to participate in the 2026 primary.
**Karrin Taylor Robson issued the following statement:**
_“I am grateful for the strong support we are seeing across Arizona. Republican voters want a conservative leader who works hard, listens, and delivers real results. Our campaign will stay focused on meeting voters in every county and sharing our plan to keep our border secure, rebuild our economy, and Make Arizona Strong Again.”_
---
|
---
| |
**About Karrin Taylor Robson** Karrin Taylor Robson is a lifelong conservative, business leader, and mother running for Governor of Arizona with President Trump’s endorsement.
Just like President Trump, Karrin is not a politician; she is a self-made business executive who has built one of the state’s leading land-use and economic development firms. Her work has helped bring jobs, opportunity, and growth to Arizona while cutting through bureaucracy and fighting government overreach. She’s also served on key military and education boards that impact Arizona families every day, including for more than 20 years on the Air Force Chief of Staff’s Civic Leaders Group.
A proud wife, mother of four, and grandmother, Karrin is running for Governor to keep our communities safe, fix, root out waste, fraud, and abuse in Arizona, and she will always have President Trump's back.
---
|
---

Team — the acting director of ICE, Todd Lyons, just called me “disgusting” because I told the truth: **it’s time to hold ICE accountable for their abuse.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120632986/586898159/2090747700?refcode=251204_sm_icerapid_img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGM5YmE2NS03MWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lRp-tFmw0djiEjOmZkn6CnQbRAcshsC18ZoTtTJp_IM=)** After I toured the Burlington facility this week, I said what any decent person would: that we need to prosecute abuses of power, not ignore them. ### About Seth Moulton

clean_body: I won't back down. | | Team — the acting director of ICE, Todd Lyons, just called me “disgusting” because I told the truth: it’s time to hold ICE accountable for their abuse. = After I toured the Burlington facility this week, I said what any decent person would: that we need to prosecute abuses of power, not ignore them. Now, instead of fixing what’s broken, ICE leadership is attacking me for calling them out. Todd Lyons’ comments make it clear why we need oversight of ICE and why the documented abuses of ICE need to be prosecuted. His complete disregard for the law his agency claims to enforce shows an utter lack of accountability and responsibility. This is likely just the beginning of their attacks on me, and that's why I need you with me. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. I’ll keep standing up for basic rights, no matter who it offends. Thank you, — Seth | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to: Seth for Massachusetts - PO Box 2013, Salem, MA, 01970 Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120632984/586898157/1412513779?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.04_OTS-Mark-Kelly-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjc3MmQ4Yy03MWQxLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t78w5sN6pxaDTGkkh_HeBeg5gUVszYPFGldKWu1VTvA=) Folks, If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, folks. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please: **[Split a donation between Off the Sidelines and me. Peter, I'm overwhelmed by the incredible support and dedication this team has shown me today. It's truly inspiring to feel the shared commitment to making Oregon a place where everyone has the opportunity to thrive. Together, we're building a future that puts people first. As I continue this fight for the state I love so much, I am grateful for supporters like you who stand with me and believe in our vision for Oregon. While the past few months have been unlike anything we’ve seen before — in our state and in our country — the way we came together made me so proud to be an Oregonian.
When President Trump tried to use our own military against us, we showed the power of peaceful resistance.
When President Trump created a food emergency by withholding SNAP funds, Oregon stepped up to help feed our neighbors.
I’ve never been prouder to work for you — but the fight isn’t over. I’m running for Governor again because Oregon values are on the line.
The choice is between a governor who will stand up for Oregon and protect what we believe in, or a governor who will let President Trump do whatever he wants.
And with everything going on, we still have to keep building on the progress we’ve made, to make sure people can afford to call Oregon home.
We expanded the number of shelter beds, began building more homes people can afford, funded summer learning, and found ways to ease the rising cost of living.
**It’s a start, but we need to do more. Especially with everything coming at us from Washington, D.C.**
As Governor, I’ve visited all thirty-six counties across Oregon, and I’ve seen firsthand the strength and resilience that makes our state such a special place.
That’s why I’m so optimistic about our future.
**It’s why I’m excited to officially announce my re-election campaign for Governor of our great state.**
**[If you’re ready to help us make more progress, will you make a contribution today to Fight Like Hell PAC and my campaign to become a kickoff donor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120633157/586903031/1471700507?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTBlMTVhZWYtNzJkMS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=On044lioOdMvsqfOFCSHx755j5eZDtv-dD8L_0wkhmY=)**

name: GOTV PAC
subject: BREAKING NEWS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
The Supreme Court has officially approved Texas’ new Trump-endorsed congressional maps for 2026. These are the same maps that a lower court ruled unconstitutional because of racial gerrymandering . The same maps, experts say, could hand Republicans up to 5 extra House seats next year.
And today, the conservative majority on the Court said Texas can use them anyway.
But here is what they are forgetting. Maps don’t vote. People do.
And if the recent Tennessee special election taught us anything, it’s that the GOP is not nearly as invincible as they pretend to be. Even in deep-red districts, margins are shrinking. Voters are shifting. And when turnout spikes in places Republicans have taken for granted, they panic.
So here is the truth: If these maps stand, our work gets harder, but it also becomes even more important. If you can, will you chip in today to help us scale our voter outreach in the communities these maps are designed to silence? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12042025]
Chip in $15 to power GOTV PAC → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12042025]
The Supreme Court may have sided with political power over voting rights today, but we don’t accept that outcome as final. We organize. We turn people out. We make them regret underestimating us.
GOTV PAC

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.

clean_body: [] Peter , The Supreme Court has officially approved Texas’ new Trump-endorsed congressional maps for 2026. These are the same maps that a lower court ruled unconstitutional because of racial gerrymandering . The same maps, experts say, could hand Republicans up to 5 extra House seats next year. And today, the conservative majority on the Court said Texas can use them anyway. But here is what they are forgetting. Maps don’t vote. People do. And if the recent Tennessee special election taught us anything, it’s that the GOP is not nearly as invincible as they pretend to be. Even in deep-red districts, margins are shrinking. Voters are shifting. And when turnout spikes in places Republicans have taken for granted, they panic. So here is the truth: If these maps stand, our work gets harder, but it also becomes even more important. If you can, will you chip in today to help us scale our voter outreach in the communities these maps are designed to silence? [] Chip in $15 to power GOTV PAC → [] The Supreme Court may have sided with political power over voting rights today, but we don’t accept that outcome as final. We organize. We turn people out. subject: Right now, I’m madder than a wet hen!

[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/ndOny7Ck_f0yxIl5k2Em7CN6w-53M_pw215eC08VM9kfcpD2D3pmPGeTBCUNkDesbcB5hPG88OkRg1jA42KPux4bI6GQFeRFXH7FdbtcEa8lJJzV2SKZkZxJRlqbGCYtLR2_LIQt_J-v7X49qB1hN8QDf2b_S9BAeMnE4BblbE_XGNFsYzQnZlNhvPTxz_k3OQ5Fgol1hvwqd36o9aGjsD-lwlb71ere3aJi5dOGl_T4ydlx96xa6M6k1XaOu6VgrRxDNwzVsZiVbGlRqXF3HBO0STqmkzgpWmB56QOu82inDZPzGce4kEZQ3LjgV2_ue6L-9f4H6HDGosH5TOSnLsacpcCJWWVWyHDjEChkOhxCbMg-rex6C6bsuqcCz84WpXFlBRXnpjPlx0WdY7DccXXPMsT1SoqlcRjtWAgOtMNcAd2t_OlBnNaxyJTZinCu0FZ8aqrfGhixN_ljnTbKMRINLA4AwY2SLGyjWTfP3pFtUoCzGrjjaUxIfshpGk3RwQVtH3j8StEsq45sfCNBUCFqcH3wUfe0bE2nrQedTzxuY5NhxlMtPC5YaE8qr8YkGPmvL84UDqiOUyNUdD6pjUFlQTzi7QWM4kBFMFj5igPApInubzSGGyBSds0uoQI8B8AdBBxrmoSDQR8THDRt9r5qb3ClxeVhuFqdp5U9-dEbPoC7DoTVT0dTXeED1CYdVK9SnLpgjACL0ofGXeTQIsFWhc0-RX9-QLLWuMIczEHqJ39K2PSH2743wzFwModH6N0By--1I7i6d7_BnPgJ5CO7GMmsSy83_oCtBENHEXXNp-cPHtk9CXWsLygLXUZUZZzqKAxviY6RFf4sjtzgL3Qbn06_OQU/trINh-LVrdIWkVTrzms4MT5zwuOMmgR8/15)The way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack.
This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior.
Whether it's...

* Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory
* Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement
* Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities

It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING.
_But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place._
Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact.
After seeing that, I knew I had to step in.
**_[So my good friend Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I got to talking. We think if we can get 10,000 God-fearing Conservatives to pitch in 10 bucks each, then we may just be able to dig our way out of this hole we're in.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/-KewVMQmwaMPKY_LcdDJVUl8jLde5B_EtyVe7JVCybpacuqajPo7QjNyf6y237o6_cTBINhy7ci43_BKIf7nKSyh9jTOF19WC86_aIZBGjgsLhnyO1fXEk-k1ovnhL6M2yKKq8NrN5MXiOvWu3qsWJNjB9FhWX2HbxU-3VGKBCEvY2upberX337zUlj_yzB4uTR7x_odQ378gZKm0rsfLUrU1E_1kH2tWuvVgs91gKRdVEx1Ns1_NZBYFbWN_8Rz4OhljBXU6Z_pe1eUxINxiBZgMUEfgqGf-sQonhBLDtG1ZKWe-sL4TKnRiifhfZUiX7L4AC5EDT1v4YloATGh9bWEy4oCtpaKyzYfxJuqfQ5Vvephj9lNWpThYFgao514GSaYBNJrn-kWNeamMl18vHGPKqXH59oKCV8Vm-hUOhlXecDHg8vzCDkIy2agr7H8-oCko2v_uLZwwYFvZjvQ8_3HBrSJ6lDGwggwUs1Uzg1Tq3pWgtQKkGQe3c_WYTV19S0dU7UvymDjG-lwjvnWWBKP1EKvcFXCzMasW6y4EJiN2UdxabiNR7pZyFyzCwhFja0DADMWhLQP4vR5Je63NEY021lEn1ucL_2ssDhQ6qBFjJQdk_h7yciIj1hNA62W-FpUhzAsXdlvRVh3yVO5eXam5uhtkmeWVkglPICPfQnuwnQBF197Wm-xkRUy41sXwTrOQkFpOXwQwRwCd5sG5JD8XSmRnHTttlq1yHQSEB1oTUXeD9Zt_QRUGwgJH1sazFLxY8ztECcudhV7EHHrxKdehJMHLP_SmxI8sQLuDQMqf43QYJhBiVi0OS90pRmGNQsdKfgN_DzzJ5yfrNXoM-rlV_NoIgw/1Dx3HDe0Fd31O6WR1P4xfFtEABFurlkd/15)_**

_House Majority Leader_

clean_body: way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack. This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior. Whether it's... Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING. But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place. Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact. After seeing that, I knew I had to step in. Do you reckon you could be one of those Conservatives? we all step up and work together I think we'll be able to keep these Democrats at bay and continue to deliver wins for good, hard workin' Americans. But I can 't do it without you, Peter. Thanks for hearing me out, John N. Kennedy A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/023b7fa8-83fb-4a1f-9a24-505f00dc5ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/023b7fa8-83fb-4a1f-9a24-505f00dc5ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Folks... _wow._ If you were with us live today, you get it. If not, get ready my friends, because this one had everything: **[breaking news](https://substack.com/redirect/9fc0c5da-2d4f-479f-9408-e88a40a08a0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , war-crime revelations, democracy on the line, our signature tech chaos...and an extraordinary guest who brought the fire, the facts, and real moral clarity: [Rosie the Resister](https://open.substack.com/users/108226928-rosie-the-resister?utm_source=mentions).
But before we dive into Rosie's brilliance, we can get this right outta the way. **David Shuster absolutely crushed it today.** He went on such a brilliant rant that I--me! The guy with the really big mouth--tried to jump in not once but twice, but David was out-of-body experience good, and s*t if that didn't set the tone for the entire show.
As I repeat many a day, I feel so lucky to get to co-host a show with David. There's nobody--_nobody_ --in this space who can take a classified-video/war-crime scandal, and combine law, politics, history, and human cost all into one exquisite tour-de-force on how insane and sick this scandal is the scandal allegedly perpetrated by future Coors Light mascot, Pete Hegseth.
Shuster is a **reporter**. The precision he brings to that craft, while still somehow making room for my historical and pop culture analogies from Herman Goering to Sean Hannity's wounded ego, makes _Amped Up_ purr like a kitten.
David's the co-pilot you want when democracy is flying through a hurricane. He'll be right there, in the eye, covering it. While Hegseth is in an "air conditioned room" chugging rubbing alcohol and searching for his fourth wife.
* * *
#### **BAM friends,**
#### When the _Henry Cuellar pardon_ story broke, the coverage felt...off.
#### Some headlines screamed _" Biden's DOJ targeted him,"_ others framed it as a bribery case. A few just ran Trump's quote as fact, no context.
#### So I opened **[Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/023b7fa8-83fb-4a1f-9a24-505f00dc5ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --Boom, the whole picture snapped into view.
#### On one screen, you can see how different outlets spun the same story:
* **Breitbart:** _" Trump Pardons Texas Democrat Indicted After Criticizing Biden's Open Borders."_
* **AP News:** _" Trump pardons Texas Democratic Rep. Cuellar in bribery and conspiracy case."_
[Check this out on Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/023b7fa8-83fb-4a1f-9a24-505f00dc5ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

#### [Two Headlines. Same Event. Different Realities](https://substack.com/redirect/9fc0c5da-2d4f-479f-9408-e88a40a08a0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!
#### [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/023b7fa8-83fb-4a1f-9a24-505f00dc5ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) breaks it down _**and**_ quantifies it: One story: 181 sources. 27% Left, 54% Center, 19% Right. Wow, transparency!
#### **You 're behind the curtain. You** _**see what corporate media 's hiding**_**. Y** _**ou**_**' re in control.**
#### **[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/023b7fa8-83fb-4a1f-9a24-505f00dc5ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for 40% off with our link:**
👉 **[https://ground.news/Blue](https://substack.com/redirect/023b7fa8-83fb-4a1f-9a24-505f00dc5ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
#### You see it, **[you can't go back](https://substack.com/redirect/023b7fa8-83fb-4a1f-9a24-505f00dc5ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. So Ground News is _**my**_ daily must-use tool.
#### --Cliff
Ground News helped me cut through the BS and see the angles.
[Subscribe to Ground News for 40% off](https://substack.com/redirect/023b7fa8-83fb-4a1f-9a24-505f00dc5ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
After the rant had reached Everest's peak, we brought on **Rosie the Resister** , for just a great conversation. Rosie walked us through the terrifying authoritarian drift we're witnessing, from Trump's extrajudicial boat bombings 1,500 miles from our shores, to ICE disappearing people on American streets, to a Republican Party that has abandoned the rule of law for rule by fear.
Rosie spoke about life inside a conservative religious system--while she was always a Democrat she was a member of the Church of Latter Day Saints until recently--and what it means to break free. She talked about how the same authoritarian mindset is part and parcel to a disturbing portion of our politics.
Rosie also talked about a great piece she wrote, making a point we at Blue Amp Media have made often. Simply "getting rid of Trump" won't fix the rot--it's reached the core, like most of Ted Nugent's STDs.
I agreed, discussed how we _must_ have accountability _throughout_ the Trump cabal. Hegseth, Noem, Patel, Bondi--the whole cast of Mad Max characters masquerading as public servants. As Rosie said, if Democrats don't act, if we keep "trusting lessons will be learned," we're handing the country over to people who think due process is optional.
**Because lessons can 't be learned by those without the emotional depth of goldfish and sociopathy of Goldfinger.**
[Subscribe to Ground News for 40% off](https://substack.com/redirect/023b7fa8-83fb-4a1f-9a24-505f00dc5ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Rosie then gave us the most personal moment of the show, her battle with long COVID. She shared how she's faced medical discrimination, and we had to discuss the absolute and brutal absurdity of America's health-care "system," which is forcing her husband out of retirement _to keep her alive_.
Yet, with all this, she's writing, resisting, fighting for justice, and holding Republicans--and "corporate Democrats" when necessary--accountable for when they fail the American people.
Rosie embodies the thing we talk about at **Blue Amp Media** every last damn day: **courage in the face of cruelty. Truth in the face of authoritarianism. Humanity in the face of systems built to erase it.**
And if you missed it live, go support her Substack, _The Resistor 's Report._ This is someone doing the work--while _literally fighting for her life_.
**To Rosie:** thank you.
**To David Shuster:** you da man
**To me:** Please go to sleep by 11pm tonight
And to all of you: keep fighting, keep thinking, keep questioning...and for the love of all things holy, find ways to recoup in between; a movie, a long bath, a massage, a good book. Whatever brings you to your zen, so you'll be ready to go again when needed.
As the sun sets slowly in the west, my friends...I bid you a fond farewell.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/023b7fa8-83fb-4a1f-9a24-505f00dc5ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

While Hegseth is in an "air conditioned room" chugging rubbing alcohol and searching for his fourth wife. BAM friends, When the Henry Cuellar pardon story broke, the coverage felt...off. Some headlines screamed " Biden's DOJ targeted him," others framed it as a bribery case. A few just ran Trump's quote as fact, no context. So I opened --Boom, the whole picture snapped into view. On one screen, you can see how different outlets spun the same story: Breitbart: " Trump Pardons Texas Democrat Indicted After Criticizing Biden's Open Borders." AP News: " Trump pardons Texas Democratic Rep. Cuellar in bribery and conspiracy case." ! breaks it down and quantifies it: One story: 181 sources. 27% Left, 54% Center, 19% Right. Wow, transparency! You 're behind the curtain. You see what corporate media 's hiding. Y ou' re in control. for 40% off with our link: 👉 You see it, . So Ground News is my daily must-use tool. --Cliff Ground News helped me cut through the BS and see the angles. After the rant had reached Everest's peak, we brought on Rosie the Resister , for just a great conversation. Rosie walked us through the terrifying authoritarian drift we're witnessing, from Trump's extrajudicial boat bombings 1,500 miles from our shores, to ICE disappearing people on American streets, to a Republican Party that has abandoned the rule of law for rule by fear. Rosie spoke about life inside a conservative religious system--while she was always a Democrat she was a member of the Church of Latter Day Saints until recently--and what it means to break free. She talked about how the same authoritarian mindset is part and parcel to a disturbing portion of our politics. Rosie also talked about a great piece she wrote, making a point we at Blue Amp Media have made often. Simply "getting rid of Trump" won't fix the rot--it's reached the core, like most of Ted Nugent's STDs. I agreed, discussed how we must have accountability throughout the Trump cabal. Hegseth, Noem, Patel, Bondi--the whole cast of Mad Max characters masquerading as public servants. As Rosie said, if Democrats don't act, if we keep "trusting lessons will be learned," we're handing the country over to people who think due process is optional. Because lessons can 't be learned by those without the emotional depth of goldfish and sociopathy of Goldfinger. Rosie then gave us the most personal moment of the show, her battle with long COVID. She shared how she's faced medical discrimination, and we had to discuss the absolute and brutal absurdity of America's health-care "system," which is forcing her husband out of retirement to keep her alive. Yet, with all this, she's writing, resisting, fighting for justice, and holding Republicans--and "corporate Democrats" when necessary--accountable for when they fail the American people. Rosie embodies the thing we talk about at Blue Amp Media every last damn day: courage in the face of cruelty. Truth in the face of authoritarianism. Humanity in the face of systems built to erase it. And if you missed it live, go support her Substack, The Resistor 's Report. This is someone doing the work--while literally fighting for her life. To Rosie: thank you. To David Shuster: you da man To me:** Please go to sleep by 11pm tonight And to all of you: keep fighting, keep thinking, keep questioning...and for the love of all things holy, find ways to recoup in between; a movie, a long bath, a massage, a good book. Whatever brings you to your zen, so you'll be ready to go again when needed. As the sun sets slowly in the west, my friends...I bid you a fond farewell. | | ---|---|--- | A guest post by| turned activist. Creator of the Resistance Report. Subscribe for insights on the clown show that is our political landscape: You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

name: Nick Melvoin
subject: Exciting News on the Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for School Board 2026, 1787 Tribute Road, Suite K, Sacramento, CA, 95815
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|

| | | | | | | | | | |

| |
Friends,
As we head into the holiday season, I’ve been reflecting on how grateful I am: for my family, for our community, and for the support so many of you have shown throughout this campaign. This work is only possible because of people who believe, as I do, that every child deserves an excellent education.
That’s why I’m especially proud to share some exciting news: our campaign has just been endorsed by Teamsters Local 572 and by the California School Employees Association Los Angeles 500.
When I first ran for school board, I made a commitment to work across lines of difference and bring folks together to ensure every child has access to a quality education. These endorsements are proof that this approach works. Now we have an opportunity to build on it, and your support makes it possible.

From day one, my focus has been on putting kids first and this has delivered real results for students. We see it in higher test scores, higher graduation rates, and sound fiscal management, but there’s still more to do.
As we close out the year, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to help us continue this momentum.
---

clean_body: Tom Cotton fights for our families| | | Senator Katie Britt here. When I ran for the Senate in Alabama, Tom Cotton had my back, and he’s had your back in the Senate. He’s a champion for faith, family, and President Trump’s agenda. He’s put parents, families, and working Americans first on every single issue that matters. Democrats would like nothing more than to catch us sleeping on Arkansas. If that happens and they defeat Tom Cotton, they’ll be able to cripple President Trump’s agenda. That’s why it’s so important that we stand with Tom now and make sure this seat stays red. For our families and our future, Katie Britt | | Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. name: Voter Action Project
subject: The lies about mail-in voting don't stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The lies and attacks on vote-by-mail have only increased in the last 48 hours, Team. Trump's statement has brought all the usual anti-voting, anti-democracy suspects out of the woodwork to ramp up the falsehoods we've heard for years.
But we've also seen defenders of voting rights standing up for our fundamental right to vote. We've just got to make sure our grassroots power can match their dark money millions and suppressive media empire.
RUSH $25 or more right now to fuel our work in the states, in Congress, and in the courts to defend mail-in voting and make every vote count in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120425_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
ABC: Trump says he will lead 'movement' to end mail-in voting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120425_3&amount=25]
Our time in the barrel has come, Team .
President Donald Trump said just hours ago that he will lead a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud.
Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. "
How is Trump going to do this? He's signing an executive order ahead of next year's critical midterms. Is this just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we going to fight him tooth and nail? You betcha.
We're going to work in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as they run elections. We're going to petition members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court.
We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120425_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120425_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120425_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120425_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120425_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120425_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120425_3&amount=35]
Trump has long lied about mail-in voting. He's claimed mail-in voting contributed to his 2020 election loss, though no widespread fraud has been found. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump .
We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing.
Being blunt: There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access. There is no good-faith reason to end the use of mail-in voting, or do the other things in this forthcoming executive order or his previous one attacking vote-by-mail. Just like the wave of redistricting efforts in Texas, Florida, and beyond -- this is a partisan voter suppression exercise meant to codify MAGA's power in perpetuity and end our democracy.
Opponents of voting rights will go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and stay in power. Help us fight back with $25 or whatever you can to protect mail-in voting and stop their suppressive policies >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120425_3&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120425_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120425_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=ASbvYbVSNiZhyqCezV2Bqq8PTUBufmx9wl1U3FlL1TxKA4Oq3KkJcdYZBv2mytTmqXwDRwrzVO6hkxFDHItbEdXmfJSo2Zj0hon4B9C7mE6q6W52d4%2FD7ICnO%2FQjDNZiDKfhY%2F5peovzPewIezUeu76tuR9c6I%2Fm7vVJPareZfrbKX3Sqx%2FhQeG76TqMJOcfjs1Fd2El5rS8yz%2BYzxBfwz7gXY2weGvKPjl3FvnuKv%2Bhd%2F5kg%2F4PWY97m5nviH3xbdJDoPgNaTFrazs11Axop72KXrAXTX2SWU6lPTsrqeVLKsrfnkPseNC9T60P0pr%2Fkgh%2FfqjelcpNqsb5oYAgmlrtT7bd7NKLI%2BcYEUZXm%2BIALFVfF12WCm2hv1u5JRaYw%2Fh5GuTsM258mTkHGh1XHm8S394VTS6ZrUl7s%2B8gvyE%3D .

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=ea6adcca8b2f4eadb6245683c9bccba2&_e=aCWtHE5rp5iQs18xEToriS58_kEKq5lITZOg044U-rWcUABtAdQZMm7SfKjDgYxDrnxJ5-Or7u0iQ4TXywEHxKsDe18TY9YMiPw2HltjSCJNWmWxW5-5z6fvN4ha-RU6MZXLbp0rzkFqV3g24dRVK_JWomTxUNwZvBidXCTaKdgfrAHhb5XBD-dDL7qaZGSUay-k_1D42AhVmBlzN9KzwL6zMiUWmox1SUWPLMeLAcjb6g0JIleyRKcjtdaYqM58_hr-HizT5ma4dUnF_5Cp7D8rvP1V-l8eui4B1sF0V1BM1p-uzN0-lfyeaPnWlZzkFHKfhejzdcVOF2fs__gaSjVYh5o7A4UuNMmNB5kL4E7jyu1ol7SSfFuWNp4N5HAVXLUa1VAuQOm1VnhQYXAf_34-tR6zc1Bs-973CvxKZ0Q7VdI9bCeF5-1kh6LUcNaOMHk-ysJkkh3TpKmxHgNgizKxFDAyaIPZIvr4Hg_Wmdb9zPXdN25L7J0J41o82rQ4WihSi6a-e4t5Z2SlUELMvIsIIq2cmydIF2WKNcxtZjbv-dcjSwU5Frk5Db3Y6j4L)

clean_body: I have decided to present you with the Trump Patriot Medal! | | CONGRATULATIONS AND THANK YOU, There is no greater honor in the world to me than serving as President of the United States. Every day, I work tirelessly to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! I would not have been able to do any of this without you, and I want to share a very special honor with you! This is why I have decided to present you with the Trump Patriot Medal: This is one of the greatest honors in the Trump World. JD Vance, Marco Rubio, and Karoline Leavitt have this award. I cannot thank you enough for your unwavering support. Together, we will continue to usher in a new era of AMERICAN GREATNESS! Thank you for everything, and congratulations! name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: We do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251204-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251204-portland-pet-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
After weeks of attacking our state, President Trump ordered troops to Portland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251204-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251204-portland-pet-rs]
In the weeks leading up to his decision, he has stood in the Oval Office and called Portland “like living in hell.” He has even attacked our neighbors as “paid terrorists.”
The Portland I know is a beautiful, vibrant, and resilient city. It’s a place where families build their futures, where communities come together, and where people stand up for justice.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251204-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251204-portland-pet-rs]
Like many other major cities across the country, Portland has faced its share of challenges. Denying this doesn’t help move Portland and Oregon forward.
At the same time, Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing.
Let me be clear: we do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon. And his threats have nothing to do with protecting Oregonians. We do not need fear-mongering from Washington. What we need is support for our communities, respect for our rights, and pride in all that makes Portland strong.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me: Add your name today to say you love Portland and you reject President Trump’s hateful, divisive rhetoric. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME: I ♥️ PORTLAND [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
Oregon will always rise to meet the moment. And no matter what threats come from Washington, we will stand together, protect our communities, and defend our state’s values.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251204-portland-pet-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=qEAGj828mGIFMHoa33EifM9xtpGlGxOtLkOUQTJYPrkjSqY%2BVkgXvz0HxvWMQFNUg7sSt%2Bk3Y9kxG2SV3cbZed2uWneUhGHpwE8S4gIVoJmPxq10%2BUy2hzHkOICIjcEGQfbc2G3f4aon4xiWyBHa3qR6rZgK73Wr5gb8mppSQZM%2FK8JJvFdppu3Fn9nu%2BHVeGU7ABtoiIjg%2F6wxHOjc0uAFdLcj2%2B3BrzPLfha4aLGvXluGcj%2FXlh0tDoFVVqGLSHZzsTFZGJZlamW9ccTTlK6EvINkJypqOmPYhhHOcgawh1NA5MY8iC%2FsO4M2XNKNRZZqno8Kf650fToh5ev1kum%2Fq8kY418uCGzHohhaWyx4SzItWvErlspajMHDpjQhVOxzVekcNfGpc%2FL9hBthBaY%2B5C0wT7XS%2Bba1EaRyAQikeXAJOH8X0SOl5tnDNYS5G .

subject: Breaking news from the Supreme Court:

body:
[1]Powered By People

Breaking news:

The Supreme Court just ruled that Texas must use Greg Abbott’s
gerrymandered maps, the ones that Donald Trump demanded in an attempt to
steal five Democratic seats ahead of the midterm elections.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251204-2.W6I4QC&refcode=ema20251204-240505&t=1002&akid=240505%2E444211%2E9g4mVx ]If you’re ready to fight back right now, chip in $3 to
help us organize on the ground in these newly drawn districts. We’re not
giving up on them; we’re going to compete in each and every single one of
them.

If Trump, Abbott, and Texas Republicans thought this ruling would stop us,
they’re 100% wrong. Because here’s the truth: Democrats can still campaign
in and WIN these gerrymandered districts.

In fact, Beto won them in 2018. How? By organizing on-the-ground and
mobilizing at the grassroots level, by registering new voters and turning
them out, and by meeting people where they are and competing everywhere.

This is the work Powered by People is doing each day. We’re not waiting
until 2026 to get started. We’re signing up volunteers, registering voters
on college campuses, recruiting candidates to run up and down the ballot,
and making sure Texans have the information they need to make their voices
heard.

With your help, we’re going to do the hard work to make sure this
gerrymandering backfires on Republicans.

clean_body: Peter, I'm not alone in believing you truly deserve this. My colleagues and I at House GOP Headquarters were all in agreement. In fact, we've made a unanimous decision. If there's anyone who has a record worthy of this, it's you. First of all, Congratulations! This is reserved only for top supporters of our movement. But I have to say, you've been so outstanding in your record of support that you've built up a profile that falls within the TOP Tier of GOP Patriots. one of House GOP's most trusted patriots, and you deserve to have the status to reflect that! And before you click, I want to let you know that we'll be leaning on you for your opinion on matters as we move forward. I'm putting this deal on the table because we can't afford to lose our most trusted allies when our majority is as thin as it is right now! You, God Bless You and God Bless America! subject: Will you give your first gift to help power my campaign for governor?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
We can’t let GOP megadonors buy this race

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=6067%2E400544%2EWy3vQH)
---
Hi there, it's Deb. If you've been waiting for the right time to make your first donation to my campaign for governor of New Mexico, this is it.
With GOP megadonors already lining up to buy this race, it's crucial we show the strength of our grassroots campaign. That's why I'm personally reaching out today to ask you to **_[make a $5 gift right now.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1401?t=2&akid=6067%2E400544%2EWy3vQH)_**
I know you might be thinking that $5 can't make a huge difference, but trust me: **It absolutely does.**
Your gift today will help my team and I ramp up our statewide grassroots organizing, prepare for the far-right attacks that will soon come our way, and build undeniable support from New Mexicans across the state.
_It's exactly what we need to win next November and keep this seat blue._
**But the only way to get there is if supporters like you chip in what you can, so please:**[_Will you make your very first donation of $5 – or whatever you can spare – right now to help me become the next governor of New Mexico?_](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1401?t=3&akid=6067%2E400544%2EWy3vQH)
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1402?t=4&akid=6067%2E400544%2EWy3vQH)
---
Together, we can make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids.
Thank you for your support,
Deb
|

[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=9&akid=6067%2E400544%2EWy3vQH)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com
**PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**

Out-of-Touch Illinois Republicans Claim Trump Is “Unpopular” – but Data Shows He’s the Only One Growing the Party (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/12/out-of-touch-illinois-republicans-claim-trump-is-unpopular-but-data-shows-hes-the-only-one-growing-the-party.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0e3ea36419-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/12/out-of-touch-illinois-republicans-claim-trump-is-unpopular-but-data-shows-hes-the-only-one-growing-the-party.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0e3ea36419-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(Photograph by Evan Vucci / AP)
By Illinois Review

A handful of irrelevant Illinois Republicans surfaced this week to repeat their favorite talking point: Donald Trump is supposedly “unpopular” in Illinois and holding the GOP back. But the numbers tell a completely different story – and their comments only highlight how disconnected they are from the voters they pretend to understand.

Former IL GOP chairman Pat Brady led the charge in today’s Illinois Playbook, declaring that “Republicans are going to have a really bad cycle if they don’t change course,” and insisting that longtime Republicans “don’t see themselves carrying the Trump flag like they used to.” He claimed Trump’s “politics just don’t work here” and that the GOP is “in limbo.”

But nothing in the numbers supports Brady’s claim. And Brady’s commentary leaves out one critical fact about his own record.

In 2012, Brady was pushed out as chairman of the Illinois GOP after breaking with the party and publicly backing gay marriage. Then in 2021, the American Civil Liberties Union of Illinois hired Brady to lobby Republican legislators to support a gay marriage bill – a move that permanently severed his credibility with the grassroots. These are the same voters now fueling Trump’s gains across Illinois. The idea that Brady speaks for them is pure fantasy.

**He dropped $20 MILLION of his own money into his campaign.**
We knew big spending was coming—he already spent $2 million on ads—but this level of cash is sooner and more aggressive than even we expected.
**[If we’re going to win, Katie needs your help to get her message out ASAP. name: Congressman Al Green, TX-09
subject: They want me gone
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/111773/images/AL%20Green/SCOTUS%20FAILED%20US.png]
Friends,
The Supreme Court’s decision to allow Texas's racially gerrymandered maps to stand is a blow to democracy.
But we need to be clear-eyed about the motivation behind this map.
Greg Abbott and Donald Trump didn't carve up our district by accident. This wasn't just a generic political maneuver.
It was a targeted strike to remove me from Congress.
They targeted me because I have the seniority to block their agenda in committee.
They targeted me because I am the one brave enough to file articles of impeachment against a lawless President.
They targeted me because I have a 20-year record of standing up to them, and they know they can't beat me at the ballot box—so they tried to beat me with a map.
The GOP isn't trying to change the district lines; they are trying to change the outcome . They want to hand-pick a representative who will be less effective and less courageous.
I will not let them pick your representative for you.
They want me gone because I am effective. The best way to fight back is to keep me right here, fighting for you.
Help me defeat their targeted attack.
Chip in $25 to keep a proven fighter on the field. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]
Unafraid,
Congressman Al Green

name: Gage Hoekstra
subject: ICYMI: Braun announces launch of ‘Family First Workplace’ policy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
“Indiana is going to lead the nation in pro-family policy,”
"Indiana is going to lead the nation in pro-family policy," No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-e-althdlt-hhlljjcji-p/) **IN CASE YOU MISSED IT** [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-r/)
# **Braun announces launch of 'Family First Workplace' policy**
[Click Here to Read the Full Story](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-y/) Fox 59
David Gay
December 2, 2025
[https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/braun-announces-launch-of-family-first-workplace-policy/](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-j/)INDIANAPOLIS -- A new initiative from the office of Indiana Gov. Mike Braun would allow eligible state employees to bring their infants to work in the first six months of their lives.According to a news release from Braun's office, Braun announced the launch of the "Family First Workplace" policy on Tuesday, stating that the program will begin as a pilot in the following agencies:
* Governor's office
* Indiana Department of Health
* State Personnel Department

This comes after [Braun signed an executive order in March](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-t/) that strengthened parental leave for Indiana employees, including six weeks of paid childbirth recovery leave and up to eight weeks of leave for those who deliver a child via C-section.In the release, Braun said that the new initiative "reflects Indiana's commitment to strengthening families, supporting parents in the workforce and promoting healthy early childhood development.""Indiana is going to lead the nation in pro-family policy," Braun said in the release. The parental bonding that happens in the first months of a child's life are irreplaceable, and our new Family First Workplace pilot program helps parents stay connected to their newborns while continuing their careers. Indiana is building a culture that puts families first." The release said the pilot program is expected to begin immediately. If successful, officials said that the initiative may expand to additional agencies. [Click Here to Read the Full Story](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-i/) [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-d/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-h/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-k/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-u/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-o/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-b/) [Click Here to Support Your Indiana Republican Party](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-althdlt-hhlljjcji-n/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. name: Kristen Waggoner
subject: May God give us courage to defend freedom
body:
There’s a sense right now—you can feel it—that something is shifting.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq4pvsloajc2e8d04u1ureb9cbtbo9gjcuupdavg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cjj6cpj6cdh2bs)

## ****
Dear Friend of Freedom,

There's a sense right now--you can feel it--that something is shifting.

People are weary of censorship, weary of hostility to faith, weary of watching freedom bow to ideology.

Some call it a "vibe shift."

But a vibe shift alone will not sustain a nation.

A cultural moment is fragile. It doesn't pass laws, build institutions, or defend the next generation's rights.

That's why Alliance Defending Freedom exists--[to turn conviction into action and ensure that liberty endures in law.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp63eb2d3qik3bi1kv74m80459ljao38i0n2vo3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cjj6cpj6cdh2bs)

**America now stands alone in the Western world, still upholding robust protections for religious liberty and free expression.**

* In the UK and Europe, Christians have been arrested for praying silently outside abortion facilities and criminally prosecuted for posting Bible verses on social media.

* In Mexico, current and former congressmen have been convicted of "gender based political violence" for speaking biological truth.

* And here at home, our freedoms often hang by a single vote at the Supreme Court.

**Freedom is not self-perpetuating. It must be defended --case by case, precedent by precedent, generation by generation.**

Your gift today helps ADF defend that freedom in the courtroom, protect those silenced for their faith, and secure lasting victories that no administration can undo.

Please make your gift before December 31. And right now, every dollar you give will be matched--dollar for dollar while matching funds last.

This moment will pass. But your action today can make freedom endure.

[Give now to defend freedom before the match expires.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlrn4gjnnkomlak4lq33lrj13rkioet2tds4q048_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cjj6cpj6cdh2bs)

May God give us the conviction to stand firm, the grace to speak truth in love, and the faith to defend the freedom that allows both truth and love to flourish.
With gratitude to God,

**Kristen Waggoner**
CEO, President & Chief Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom
---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---
