name: James Talarico
subject: It’s time to start flipping tables
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
My granddad was a Baptist preacher in South Texas.
#
**It's time to start flipping tables.**
My granddad was a Baptist preacher in South Texas.
He taught me that we follow a barefoot rabbi who gave us two commandments: love God and love neighbor.
Because there is no love of God without love of neighbor.
Every single person bears the image of the sacred; every single person is holy. Not just the neighbors who look like me or pray like me or vote like me — all of my neighbors.
The billionaires of this country divide us by party, by race, by gender, by religion, so we don’t notice they’re defunding our schools, gutting our healthcare, and cutting taxes for themselves and their rich friends.
It’s the oldest strategy in the world: divide and conquer. But we will not be conquered.
They want to keep us from seeing all that we have in common.
They want to keep us from realizing there’s far more that unites us than divides us. Because once we do, we’ll come together — across party, across race, across gender, across religion — to take back power for ourselves and our communities.
2,000 years ago, when the powerful few rigged the system, that barefoot rabbi walked into the seat of power and flipped over the tables of injustice.
To those who love this state, to those who love this country, to those who love our neighbors: it’s time to start flipping tables.
Thank you for being in this struggle with me.
James

* * *

👋 An important request before you scroll away...
The most important FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign is coming up fast and James needs your help. When this deadline ends, we're legally required to report what we've raised and everyone will be watching.
[**If winning Texas' Senate seat feels worth $5 to you, that is the contribution James is hoping you'll make today.Thank you.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251205-1-ak&t=1&akid=294%2E1347274%2EGvwKyl)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251205-1-ak&t=2&akid=294%2E1347274%2EGvwKyl)

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=3&akid=294%2E1347274%2EGvwKyl) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=4&refcode2=294_1347274_GvwKyl&akid=294%2E1347274%2EGvwKyl)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=294%2E1347274%2EGvwKyl).

# IBM CEO slams trillion-dollar AI bubble investments
In a stark warning at the Reuters Next conference, IBM CEO Arvind Krishna declared there's **["no way"](https://substack.com/redirect/0965bb1b-6a3d-4860-8216-022ef9157ea2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the tech industry's projected $8 trillion splurge on AI data centers will yield returns amid skyrocketing infrastructure costs and rapid chip depreciation, urging a hard rethink on the AGI arms race.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0965bb1b-6a3d-4860-8216-022ef9157ea2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trillion-Dollar CapEx Crunch** : Krishna calculates $8 trillion in global AI infrastructure commitments--equivalent to 100 gigawatts--demanding $800 billion in annual profits just to service interest at current rates.
* **Rapid Chip Depreciation Trap** : AI hardware must be fully utilized within five years before obsolescence forces costly replacements, inflating expenses beyond sustainable levels for most firms.
* **Gigawatt-Scale Skepticism** : A single company's 20-30 gigawatt pledge equates to $1.5 trillion upfront, with Krishna questioning viability as energy demands strain worldwide grids.
* **AGI Hype Reality Check** : IBM chief pegs artificial general intelligence odds at 0-1%, dismissing trillion-dollar chases as speculative amid calls for massive policy-driven energy expansions.

* * *

# [If you had ](https://substack.com/redirect/37b4c60a-481f-4d54-962e-59b5d8655001?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[$8,268 in 1920](https://substack.com/redirect/37b4c60a-481f-4d54-962e-59b5d8655001?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[, you had a choice.](https://substack.com/redirect/37b4c60a-481f-4d54-962e-59b5d8655001?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Some people put it into a hard asset. Others left it in cash.
* Today, one of those choices might have **turned into generational wealth**.
* The other? It's barely enough for a clapped out Winnebago.
* Most people don't realize how this happened--or what it could mean for the future.

**[This quick video](https://substack.com/redirect/37b4c60a-481f-4d54-962e-59b5d8655001?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** breaks it down.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/37b4c60a-481f-4d54-962e-59b5d8655001?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

# Bank of America unleashes crypto for elite clients
In a bold leap into digital assets, Bank of America on Thursday announced it will empower wealth advisors to **[recommend cryptocurrency exchange-traded products](https://substack.com/redirect/263ca90c-a43e-4444-9d8b-fc646d08b63d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to clients starting January 5, 2026, amid surging institutional demand and regulatory tailwinds from President Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/263ca90c-a43e-4444-9d8b-fc646d08b63d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Advisors Gain Recommendation Power** : Merrill and Private Bank advisors can now suggest crypto ETPs without asset minimums, evolving from order executors to proactive guides for client portfolios.
* **Modest Allocations Urged** : CIO Chris Hyzy advises 1%-4% crypto exposure for volatility-tolerant investors, positioning digital assets as a thematic hedge against inflation and traditional markets.
* **ETFs Accessible Since 2024** : High-asset clients gained ETF entry early last year, but new rules democratize access, favoring liquid ETPs for enhanced security and compliance over direct holdings.
* **Volatility Warnings Issued** : Despite adoption boom, Merrill cautions on speculative excesses distorting prices, as Bitcoin's November 2025 plunge highlights risks in this nascent asset class.

* * *
* * *
# Buy Now, Pay Later firms probed by State AGs over "Shadow Debt" time bomb
State attorneys general **[launched probes into buy-now-pay-later services](https://substack.com/redirect/2aa5b2de-69cc-49ef-84b3-c513263cd4fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** this week, warning of mounting "shadow debt" risks as holiday shoppers--especially young adults--splurge over $10 billion, experts say.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2aa5b2de-69cc-49ef-84b3-c513263cd4fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Holiday Spending Surges Dramatically** : Adobe forecasts $10 billion in BNPL holiday purchases, a 9% jump from last year, with half of shoppers planning to use it amid rising prices and economic pressures.
* **Youth Demographics Drive Adoption** : Gen Z and millennials lead usage, with 1 in 4 relying regularly on BNPL's low-barrier credit, appealing even to those with damaged scores via affordable rates.
* **Shadow Debt Evades Oversight** : Multiple micro-loans across providers create untrackable obligations, risking overdrafts and bounced payments like rent, as experts warn of overspending surprises.
* **Regulatory Scrutiny Intensifies Urgently** : California's Rob Bonta and six other states demanded details from Affirm, Klarna, and PayPal on fees and underwriting gaps, highlighting potential for fees to spiral into serious debt.

* * *
* * *
# California homes can get insured again--at a premium price
In a bold pivot amid California's wildfire-ravaged insurance crisis, Farmers Insurance has **[scrapped its 9,500-policy monthly cap](https://substack.com/redirect/e3ee5997-aaf7-417c-b450-167bb68c64c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on new homeowners coverage, vowing to expand access statewide starting early next year--but only after regulators greenlight a 6.99% average rate hike.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3ee5997-aaf7-417c-b450-167bb68c64c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Cap Elimination Boosts Access** : Farmers ends its restrictive 9,500 new policy limit per month, first imposed at 7,000 in 2023, to revive offerings in fire-prone, underserved "distressed" zones like Montecito and Santa Barbara County.
* **Rate Hike Funds Expansion** : The insurer's requested 6.99% premium increase adjusts pricing formulas, potentially raising costs for most customers while boosting home-auto bundle discounts from 15% to 22% for savings.
* **New Products Target Renters** : Launching Farmers Smart Plan Home, Condo, and Renters policies under the state's Sustainable Insurance Strategy to broaden coverage options beyond traditional homeowners.
* **Outreach Targets 300,000** : From early 2026, direct marketing and enhanced agent tools will reach about 300,000 Californians in high-risk areas, resuming applications for industries and manufactured homes previously paused.

* * *
* * *
# Metaverse massacre: 30% slash shocks Wall Street, shares surge
Meta Platforms' stock surged 4% Thursday after reports emerged of CEO Mark Zuckerberg proposing up to **[30% budget cuts to the money-losing metaverse](https://substack.com/redirect/059b0f60-a0fa-4b21-a305-09eb12d112e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** division, including potential layoffs, as part of 2026 planning to stem billions in red ink.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/059b0f60-a0fa-4b21-a305-09eb12d112e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Zuckerberg 's Bold Pivot Backlash**: Meta's 2021 Metaverse bet, hailed by CEO Mark Zuckerberg as the "next frontier," now faces 30% budget reductions amid persistent underperformance.
* **Reality Labs ' Staggering Losses**: The VR-focused unit posted a $4.4 billion third-quarter deficit, contributing to over $70 billion in cumulative losses since late 2020.
* **Layoff Fears Grip Employees** : Proposed cuts target the virtual reality group, likely triggering widespread job reductions as executives finalize 2026 allocations.
* **Investor Relief Fuels Rally** : Shares climbed to $668.38, up 4.5%, signaling market approval for reining in the division's unchecked spending spree.

* * *
* * *
# **Wall Street heads for the exit on AI debt time bomb**
Wall Street firms are **[scrambling to slash exposure](https://substack.com/redirect/3788b2e2-b553-4309-af16-69eed55e962b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to the artificial intelligence sector's skyrocketing debt after a massive borrowing spree fueled explosive growth, with banks like JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs leading the charge to avert potential defaults amid stubbornly high interest rates and regulatory scrutiny.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3788b2e2-b553-4309-af16-69eed55e962b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **AI Firms Borrow Billions Rapidly** : Tech giants including Oracle, Meta, and Alphabet have amassed over $100 billion in low-cost loans since 2023 to fund data centers and chip expansions, accelerating AI infrastructure buildout.
* **Banks Tighten Lending Standards Now** : Major lenders are capping new AI-related credit lines at $50 million per deal and demanding stricter collateral, fearing overleveraged startups could collapse like past dot-com busts.
* **Interest Rates Spark Alarm** : The Federal Reserve's reticence to cut rates have increased borrowing costs for AI ventures, prompting analysts to warn of a "debt reckoning" that could slash sector valuations by up to 30% in 2026.
* **Regulatory Probes Intensify Quickly** : SEC investigations into opaque AI financing practices are underway, with experts predicting tougher disclosure rules that may slow venture capital inflows and reshape Silicon Valley's funding landscape.

Wall Street heads for the exit on AI debt time bomb Wall Street firms are to the artificial intelligence sector's skyrocketing debt after a massive borrowing spree fueled explosive growth, with banks like JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs leading the charge to avert potential defaults amid stubbornly high interest rates and regulatory scrutiny. | | ---|---|--- AI Firms Borrow Billions Rapidly : Tech giants including Oracle, Meta, and Alphabet have amassed over $100 billion in low-cost loans since 2023 to fund data centers and chip expansions, accelerating AI infrastructure buildout. Banks Tighten Lending Standards Now : Major lenders are capping new AI-related credit lines at $50 million per deal and demanding stricter collateral, fearing overleveraged startups could collapse like past dot-com busts. Interest Rates Spark Alarm : The Federal Reserve's reticence to cut rates have increased borrowing costs for AI ventures, prompting analysts to warn of a "debt reckoning" that could slash sector valuations by up to 30% in 2026. Regulatory Probes Intensify Quickly : SEC investigations into opaque AI financing practices are underway, with experts predicting tougher disclosure rules that may slow venture capital inflows and reshape Silicon Valley's funding landscape. The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism * You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Matthew Miller 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: PA FWD Party December Newsletter
body:
Branching out, Planting seeds

|
### Join us December 15 at 8pm for a special Year End call. This will be a combined call with some of our neighboring states to share the progress everyone is making.
## [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQURXQj7vXiSR9wiwr1VtBvhx5qQ6FWllk4LAtP7BaOzA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_december_newsletter&n=1)
* * *
## Branching Out
We're wrapping up yet another year and our best election season yet. For nearly 4 years, regular people like you from across PA have volunteered their time, talent, and treasure to achieve a vision to grow a viable 3rd party focused on values and getting stuff done. We still have a long way to go, but we can confidently say we're here to stay. We have strong roots growing in certain parts of the state (Philadelphia, Pittsburgh, Harrisburg), but for our plans to work we need to branch out to the parts of the state we haven't reached yet. We need people across the state organize locally, even in groups as small as 2 or 3. A small group of Forward Pennsylvanians can make a big difference. Many of you are already attempting to make changes in your communities and working to make a difference. We urge you to make us stronger by combining efforts with ours. Together, we have great opportunities in 2026 and beyond. There are 67 counties in PA. We're launching a new effort to have dedicated Volunteer Leads in each. This role can be what you make of it. Would you like to contact Forwardists in your area? Talk to new sign ups they come in? Talk to people in your area about running for office with Forward? Host occasional meetups or virtual calls? This could be the role for you. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u6u_UJMP7K7vsJ76YDOs-kzjQtrU51zJMjkgoh57kjDT&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_december_newsletter&n=2) \-- [Or fill out the interest form here](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=WArSXe-hufzYEjhaXmZeHWj-u36sV3JmN27GzLTXQHZHeuJj0oLTJJlgkM-zRTM7xtQ8XLMYLtz21rgH1NulnK5F2YX3x-JTwNydaoTIea67zeb33ZKiB34j3OpjRYgH4txVFDci3QILjdK6UbN-0g&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_december_newsletter&n=3) \--
* * *
### Planting Seeds
In this case, a seed is an investment. We want to thank everyone who has donated in the past, especially our recurring donors. Steady recurring low dollar donations let us know we're going to have money in the bank for the small expenses we have and the ability to plan for the future. Your donations will go towards, campaign materials, tabling events, and reservation expenses for our upcoming 2026 convention. If you haven't donated to our State Party before, please consider setting up a recuring donation this year. If you want to see the PA Forward Party to truly change the way we do politics in this state, please invest in this vision. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_december_newsletter&n=4 "Join our 2026 Donors") [Join our 2026 Donors](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_december_newsletter&n=4)

name: Wes Moore
subject: Need your help
body:
This is going to make me a target.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1021%2E1086043%2EXaEG3e)
Peter, I need your help right now.
**I just announced the Governor's Redistricting Advisory Commission to re-examine our congressional maps here in Maryland.**
The moment I took this stand, I became an even bigger target for Republican attacks. They're going to come after me for this, and that means I need your support now more than ever before.
When you stand up to powerful interests, there are consequences. Republicans are going to spend heavily to punish me for refusing to sit back while they rig the system across the country. Your contribution today is what gives me the strength to take these stands even when I know the attacks are coming.
**[Please stand with me by making a contribution of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today. I'm ready to take the heat, but I need you standing with me.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251205-1.9zOZ0q&refcode=em-20251205-1&t=2&akid=1021%2E1086043%2EXaEG3e)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251205-1.9zOZ0q&amount=5&refcode=em-20251205-1&t=21&akid=1021%2E1086043%2EXaEG3e)**
Thank you,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251205-1.9zOZ0q&refcode=em-20251205-1&t=22&akid=1021%2E1086043%2EXaEG3e)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251205-1&t=23&refcode2=1021_1086043_XaEG3e&akid=1021%2E1086043%2EXaEG3e)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=1021%2E1086043%2EXaEG3e)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1021%2E1086043%2EXaEG3e)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

I just announced the Governor's Redistricting Advisory Commission to re-examine our congressional maps here in Maryland. The moment I took this stand, I became an even bigger target for Republican attacks. They're going to come after me for this, and that means I need your support now more than ever before. When you stand up to powerful interests, there are consequences. Republicans are going to spend heavily to punish me for refusing to sit back while they rig the system across the country. Your contribution today is what gives me the strength to take these stands even when I know the attacks are coming. Thank you, Wes

name: Andy Beshear
subject: My message has never waivered:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

I'm traveling the country helping Democrats win the key races we need in 2026 by sharing our winning playbook. My message is simple, and it's the same one that helped me win _three_ statewide elections in Kentucky:

Put people first, **always.**

Trump and Congressional Republicans have made their priorities clear. They're willing to extend tax cuts for the wealthy, but refuse to make healthcare affordable for working families. They are promoting reckless tariffs that are raising costs for Americans with no relief in sight. And they are using their political power to deny Americans the benefits they need to survive.

Last month, Americans showed that they want something different. Democrats won in key statewide elections and proved that when you listen to voters, hear their concerns, and bring real solutions to make their lives better, you can win big.

I'm talking with candidates across the country and sharing my story because it's proof that this kind of campaigning works. I'm in my position as Governor of Kentucky because I proved that when Democrats put people first and stand firm on our values, we can win tough elections anywhere.

That's how we can flip the House in 2026 and finally put a check on Trump and the Republicans who enable him. We're already investing in the races that will make the biggest difference, but I'm counting on you to help us continue to expand our reach nationwide to elect real, honest, for-the-people leaders to Congress.

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Introducing the Aviation Funding Solvency Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
I introduced a bipartisan bill called the Aviation Funding Solvency Act.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120695033/587068529/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmQxNmY0Zi0wZGQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ynw6KmbI5EnuHsT7eKWYUI12Z5fGYJqIbcleNfKLlP8=&emci=5898903d-03cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=76d16f4f-0dd2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9494239)
---

| | As the ranking member of the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I worked with the other members of the Committee to introduce **_the Aviation Funding Solvency Act._** This bipartisan legislation will ensure that, during any future government shutdowns, the U.S. National Airspace System and those responsible for its safe, efficient operation are protected from any lapses in federal funding. During a shutdown, the bill will allow the FAA to access the Aviation Insurance Revolving Fund to cover critical services that will keep our aviation system running safely for the traveling public, while ensuring the Revolving Fund has a healthy balance to address potential claims. I am grateful to our invaluable aviation safety workforce, who, during the longest shutdown in history, did not waver in their duties to keep the flying public safe – despite not knowing when their next paycheck would come. This bipartisan bill will ensure that the hardworking men and women who protect the flying public will continue to get paid during future shutdowns and allow the FAA to operate uninterrupted so the agency can focus on its critical airspace safety mission. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: I introduced a bipartisan bill called the Aviation Funding Solvency Act. | | | | As the ranking member of the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I worked with the other members of the Committee to introduce the Aviation Funding Solvency Act. This bipartisan legislation will ensure that, during any future government shutdowns, the U.S. National Airspace System and those responsible for its safe, efficient operation are protected from any lapses in federal funding. During a shutdown, the bill will allow the FAA to access the Aviation Insurance Revolving Fund to cover critical services that will keep our aviation system running safely for the traveling public, while ensuring the Revolving Fund has a healthy balance to address potential claims. I am grateful to our invaluable aviation safety workforce, who, during the longest shutdown in history, did not waver in their duties to keep the flying public safe – despite not knowing when their next paycheck would come. This bipartisan bill will ensure that the hardworking men and women who protect the flying public will continue to get paid during future shutdowns and allow the FAA to operate uninterrupted so the agency can focus on its critical airspace safety mission. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . Pushed by Trump

In a shocking decision, the Court ruled that Texas must use Republicans’
heavily gerrymandered maps — maps engineered to appease Donald Trump and
steal five Democratic seats. This isn’t democracy. This is a power grab.

Let’s be honest: this ruling isn’t about the law. It’s about judges
picking winners and losers based on party loyalty, not justice. It’s about
protecting political power instead of protecting the people.

This is outrageous. And it cannot stand.

Republicans are trying to rig elections. The Court is letting them. But we
refuse to stay silent.

Demand Justice is fighting for a judiciary that serves the people, not
political operatives. We’re calling out the judges enabling this
corruption, exposing their bias, and pushing for bold reforms to reclaim
our courts.

We’re sorry to be so direct, but this deadline is critical. **If you need to hear more before committing a donation to re-elect John, here are FIVE reasons why we’re asking for your $5 today:**
1) **John is pushing back against the chaos in Washington every way he can.** He’s fighting tooth and nail to safeguard Colorado’s public lands, push back against Trump’s inflationary tariff-taxes, and defend Coloradans’ access to affordable health care.
2) **Colorado is key to rebuilding our Senate majority.** If we lose John’s seat, Democrats will have zero path to taking back the Senate in 2026 or in 2028.
3) **National Republicans could see Colorado as a prime pickup opportunity in the Senate.** If they sense any weakness in John’s campaign, they won’t hesitate to flood the state with outside money to replace him with a rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda.

name: Haley S.
subject: null, I'm so grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Can you do me a favor?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1486%2E49239%2EUeZ6lm)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9463?t=2&akid=1486%2E49239%2EUeZ6lm)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10060?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1486%2E49239%2EUeZ6lm)
Hi null,

Before anything else, I want to say _thank you_. I can’t even begin to express how much it means to me to have you stand beside me as we fight to keep Michigan blue.
Thanks to your support, we’ve had an incredible start: **_Multiple_ polls have shown me as the strongest Democrat to face my MAGA Republican opponent, Mike Rogers.**
That’s HUGE. And even though this polling is within the margin of error, it shows we’ve got real momentum and that working people in Michigan are sick and tired of Trump’s chaos agenda.
But now we need to keep our momentum going. And I want to make sure I’m focused on the issues that matter most to you and your family. null, **[will you take 60 seconds to complete my official Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10060?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1486%2E49239%2EUeZ6lm)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10060?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1486%2E49239%2EUeZ6lm)
---
Your feedback will help guide this campaign every step of the way, from the messages we share to the voters we reach out to all across this great state.
**I love Michigan. I grew up here – surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work.** My parents ran a landscaping business, and from a young age, I learned what it meant to put in a full day’s work to build a better future for your family.

I’ve spent my career doing just that. During the Great Recession, I helped lead President Obama’s Auto Rescue, helping save 200,000 Michigan jobs. Then in 2018, I flipped a Republican-held House seat blue – and helped Democrats take back the House majority.
Now, I’m raising my hand again, this time to fight for Michiganders in the U.S. Senate.

null, I can’t do it alone. This campaign is built by and for grassroots supporters like you. Your voice matters deeply to me, **[so will you share your thoughts and take my official Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10060?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1486%2E49239%2EUeZ6lm)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10060?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1486%2E49239%2EUeZ6lm)
---
With gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9465?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1486%2E49239%2EUeZ6lm) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9463?t=9&akid=1486%2E49239%2EUeZ6lm)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=10&akid=1486%2E49239%2EUeZ6lm)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Ruiz HQ
subject: This isn’t making healthcare accessible.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
We need MORE hospitals and healthcare workers, not fewer!

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=dvUuk4bziZEsJnyrJ0wmT2v%2FLv7SRyzNhyrflY7Z7v6fKW5OVwvurUsIwGDFsEXFJIiVPJ4zFwSAXzpU9Frjd8UGYdZ1GW2Wsy9LdYz8VOzytVpX%2BL6h6%2B9XgHW7OX3SdFbkw0aRmI1ygW9E8%2B9BQDt4SJUzBKALHcIRpBxhw%2Bbk3%2BTO9KnzMjzGXBGArXeazfmwu3FSHO10CRd%2B1n32CwWazb4%2BpJWXU%2FN3phmfdQmkVQSKSj71tyA07KgS07P9apTWl7%2BBScU%2BPziu64p3yM5Q6gEzGE4k0WWKT0fkgW0bYrpmIYIk6YompxiyTxOYZPARRvs3wcG4sVuk8Eu8o%2B7VLKVx001NBf8EVNjsJtOpYNRISMoxsGegi%2BjXLpc9rkeyZfgFtldddMdf%2By9o%2Bl3DjUiS7L04DBJn9iwLWlIBx4KfOcrtemzzpkkDA8jv)
---
| |
---
Republicans have it all backwards. **First,** they gutted Medicaid, causing millions of Americans to lose their health insurance. **Then,** struggling rural hospitals like Palo Verde Healthcare District in Blythe were pushed into bankruptcy. **Now,** changes to student loan programs are making it harder for nursing students to afford their education — blocking the next generation of healthcare workers before they even start. As one of the few physicians in Congress, Dr. Raul Ruiz knows we need more hospitals and healthcare workers, not fewer. He’s fighting to expand access to healthcare and ensure that funding doesn't get in the way of people receiving care or entering the healthcare profession. [But right now, he needs your help to fight back against Republican attacks aimed at flipping our district red. Will you chip in $10 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120695608/587070008/936185492?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_120525_HEALTHATTACK2_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3NTRkYjMtMGVkMi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Z-DnVR-TPlqT1WD4NwF9Ra0c00vbCokEzWcUcsLLflg=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120695614/587070015/936185492?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_120525_HEALTHATTACK2_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3NTRkYjMtMGVkMi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Z-DnVR-TPlqT1WD4NwF9Ra0c00vbCokEzWcUcsLLflg=)**

— Ruiz HQ
**\-------------Forwarded message from Dr.Raul Ruiz-------------**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120695652/587070054/936185492?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_120525_HEALTHATTACK2_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3NTRkYjMtMGVkMi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Z-DnVR-TPlqT1WD4NwF9Ra0c00vbCokEzWcUcsLLflg=)
**Quality and affordable healthcare requires investing in infrastructure and the next generation of healthcare workers.**
As a former emergency physician, I know firsthand that healthcare workers deserve every bit of support our leaders can give them. [That’s why I’m committed to defending Americans’ healthcare on every front. If you’re with me in that fight, please chip in $10 now to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120695656/587070057/936185492?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_120525_HEALTHATTACK2_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3NTRkYjMtMGVkMi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Z-DnVR-TPlqT1WD4NwF9Ra0c00vbCokEzWcUcsLLflg=)
The Trump administration’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” gutted Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for the one percent — _leaving millions of Americans without healthcare._
The result? People are forced to go without the care they desperately need, and hospitals throughout America, like the Palo Verde Healthcare District in Blythe, are being pushed into bankruptcy.
No one should have to drive _over 100 miles_ to receive life-saving care, but this is now the reality for thousands of Blythe residents.
And it doesn’t stop there.
**The same Republican budget bill that gutted Medicaid will make it harder for students to get financing for healthcare careers like advanced nursing degrees.**
This is bad news for rural communities that already face a shortage of healthcare workers and depend on nurse practitioners for primary care.
**Republicans aren't just closing hospitals — they're also shrinking the next generation of healthcare workers.**
These attacks on healthcare won’t end until we finally flip the House blue and take back our Democratic majority.
In this razor-slim majority, every seat counts, and my district (CA-25) is one of the most competitive districts in the nation. That’s why the Republican strategists are coming after us with everything they’ve got.
[I need your help to fight back. Will you chip in any amount today to defend this seat and bring quality, affordable healthcare to every Californian?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120695660/587070062/936185492?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_120525_HEALTHATTACK2_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3NTRkYjMtMGVkMi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Z-DnVR-TPlqT1WD4NwF9Ra0c00vbCokEzWcUcsLLflg=)
_If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: We need MORE hospitals and healthcare workers, not fewer! While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Republicans have it all backwards. First, they gutted Medicaid, causing millions of Americans to lose their health insurance. Then, struggling rural hospitals like Palo Verde Healthcare District in Blythe were pushed into bankruptcy. Now, changes to student loan programs are making it harder for nursing students to afford their education — blocking the next generation of healthcare workers before they even start. As one of the few physicians in Congress, Dr. Raul Ruiz knows we need more hospitals and healthcare workers, not fewer. He’s fighting to expand access to healthcare and ensure that funding doesn't get in the way of people receiving care or entering the healthcare profession. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = — Ruiz HQ \-------------Forwarded message from Dr.Raul Ruiz------------- = Quality and affordable healthcare requires investing in infrastructure and the next generation of healthcare workers. As a former emergency physician, I know firsthand that healthcare workers deserve every bit of support our leaders can give them. = The Trump administration’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” gutted Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for the one percent — leaving millions of Americans without healthcare. The result? People are forced to go without the care they desperately need, and hospitals throughout America, like the Palo Verde Healthcare District in Blythe, are being pushed into bankruptcy. No one should have to drive over 100 miles to receive life-saving care, but this is now the reality for thousands of Blythe residents. And it doesn’t stop there. The same Republican budget bill that gutted Medicaid will make it harder for students to get financing for healthcare careers like advanced nursing degrees. This is bad news for rural communities that already face a shortage of healthcare workers and depend on nurse practitioners for primary care. Republicans aren't just closing hospitals — they're also shrinking the next generation of healthcare workers. These attacks on healthcare won’t end until we finally flip the House blue and take back our Democratic majority. In this razor-slim majority, every seat counts, and my district (CA-25) is one of the most competitive districts in the nation. That’s why the Republican strategists are coming after us with everything they’ve got. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Dr. Raul Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. name: Troy Downing
subject: When I was deployed to Afghanistan, I prayed my family would be safe... God answered.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
God Works.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTIwNV9QUS1RVC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3Njc4NTYtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEyMDVfUFEtUVQuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzY3ODU2LTI4OTkifQ/zygTl715UN5G_N2AZ-ls3w)God works in mysterious ways...
When I started my first business, I prayed it would be successful... **God answered.**
When I was deployed to Afghanistan, I prayed my family would be safe... **God answered.**
When I saw career politicians turn their backs on Americans to put their pet projects before the interest of the American people, I prayed for a better outcome...
I was surprised when **_God called on ME_** to run for office.
I'm Troy Downing. You might not recognize my name, but that's okay.
I'm a combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian. A husband & a proud dad.
**[I'm also the Republican running for re-election in Congress for Montana in the biggest race in the country.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTIwNV9QUS1RVC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3Njc4NTYtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEyMDVfUFEtUVQuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzY3ODU2LTI4OTkifQ/CKsl00Jx5JNVXd-EYT-ECQ)**
I'm not in this to become a household name or for the title. I don't care about any of that.
I'm a simple man who enjoys a beer, likes to hunt and fish with my buddies & puts my family before anything else.
**__But I'm at my wits' end with two-faced politicians and DC bigwigs who say one thing to your face, only to turn around & stab hard-working folks like you & me in the back.__**
I'll always tell the truth. I'll always put America first. I'll always stand up for what's right.
The Radical Left will spread lies about me & throw me under the bus just to end my campaign before the midterms.
**[Peter, can you take a leap of faith on a simple combat vet like me to beat the Left & save our country?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTIwNV9QUS1RVC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3Njc4NTYtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEyMDVfUFEtUVQuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzY3ODU2LTI4OTkifQ/sUq7hJePb1-xLVnEHt4qPA)**[HELP A COMBAT VET
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTIwNV9QUS1RVC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3Njc4NTYtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEyMDVfUFEtUVQuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzY3ODU2LTI4OTkifQ/qJBphIxpCqmB_RWCkrijxw)I know if we win this race, we can bring the entire Democrat Machine to its knees.
Thank you & God Bless,
Troy Downing (R-MT)| |

name: Seth Moulton
subject: You gave this campaign its backbone last month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
November reminded me why we’re doing this.

| |
---
Team, Before December really kicks in, I wanted to reach out personally and say thank you — not in the “campaign boilerplate” way, but earnestly. November was one of the most clarifying months I’ve had in a long time. I talked with students who worry they’ll never be able to afford to stay in the state where they grew up. [During my visit to Western Massachusetts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120697178/587073517/800127644?refcode=251205_sm_ty_l1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDgxZmU3OC0xMmQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=824NJkdO9RBrAZGmzn6TDqZ5bmiMdfqH1GTuOryjWUU=), I heard from parents who are doing everything right and still feel like they’re one unexpected bill away from falling behind. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120697180/587073518/800127644?refcode=251205_sm_ty_img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDgxZmU3OC0xMmQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=824NJkdO9RBrAZGmzn6TDqZ5bmiMdfqH1GTuOryjWUU=) And I spent time with volunteers who see, up close, how great the need is right now. Those conversations don’t disappear when the event is over. They sit with you. They sat with me all month.

And your support is the reason I’m able to keep showing up for those conversations — even when they’re tough, even when it would be easier to coast or wait for a “better moment.” I’m not interested in waiting. I don’t think the country can afford to. So yes, I’m grateful we hit our November goals. But I’m even more grateful for what that actually represents: that there are people who believe we can do better than the status quo, and who are willing to fuel a campaign that says so out loud. December will be a big month. I’ll have more to share soon. But I didn’t want to move forward without saying: thank you for giving this campaign its backbone. — Seth | **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120697184/587073519/800127644?refcode=251205_sm_ty_b1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDgxZmU3OC0xMmQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=824NJkdO9RBrAZGmzn6TDqZ5bmiMdfqH1GTuOryjWUU=)**

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Three Hundred Seventy Five
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark Kelly has successfully landed on an aircraft carrier more than 375 times.
#

Team —
Mark Kelly has successfully landed on an aircraft carrier 375 times.
That's not easy.
First off, the landing area of an aircraft carrier is only a few hundred feet in length. That’s about 1/40th the length of a runway at a military airbase. But what makes this even more complicated is that your runway is moving through the water. It moves to the right because of the angled deck, and bobs up and down like a cork, and rocks left and right in the ocean. It’s challenging during the day and often feels impossible at night. Naval aviators have to do this in all kinds of conditions... rain, snow, fog, and during combat when the ship is often blacked out so it can’t be found by the enemy.
He did this 375 times, and every time any naval aviator does this, he or she is risking their life for their country. And then he launched on a rocket ship and into space four times in a spacecraft that is more complicated and more difficult to operate than any other machine ever built by humans.
So, when Mark says he isn't intimidated by Donald Trump and the White House, Pete Hegseth at the Department of Defense, or Kash Patel at the FBI... you can take his word for it.
But that doesn’t mean we can underestimate them. They have the full weight of the executive branch behind them, and they're bearing down on Mark.
Hegseth directed the Secretary of the Navy to deliver him a report by Wednesday on what they will do to Mark — whether they will recall him to active duty and court-martial him.
Mark was successful at every one of those landings and space missions because he prepared for them, and because he had a huge team behind him. This is no different, so we are humbly asking you:
[**Please, make a donation to Mark so he knows we're ready for whatever Hegseth and Trump throw at him. It'll add up fast if tons of people do their part and chip in.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.FHtwNx&refcode=em251205-1-1mil&t=1&akid=6279%2E6688874%2EqLc4r6)

clean_body: Mark Kelly has successfully landed on an aircraft carrier more than 375 times. Team — Mark Kelly has successfully landed on an aircraft carrier 375 times. That's not easy. First off, the landing area of an aircraft carrier is only a few hundred feet in length. That’s about 1/40th the length of a runway at a military airbase. But what makes this even more complicated is that your runway is moving through the water. It moves to the right because of the angled deck, and bobs up and down like a cork, and rocks left and right in the ocean. It’s challenging during the day and often feels impossible at night. Naval aviators have to do this in all kinds of conditions... rain, snow, fog, and during combat when the ship is often blacked out so it can’t be found by the enemy. He did this 375 times, and every time any naval aviator does this, he or she is risking their life for their country. And then he launched on a rocket ship and into space four times in a spacecraft that is more complicated and more difficult to operate than any other machine ever built by humans. So, when Mark says he isn't intimidated by Donald Trump and the White House, Pete Hegseth at the Department of Defense, or Kash Patel at the FBI... you can take his word for it. But that doesn’t mean we can underestimate them. They have the full weight of the executive branch behind them, and they're bearing down on Mark. Hegseth directed the Secretary of the Navy to deliver him a report by Wednesday on what they will do to Mark — whether they will recall him to active duty and court-martial him. Mark was successful at every one of those landings and space missions because he prepared for them, and because he had a huge team behind him. This is no different, so we are humbly asking you: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, sincerely, for your help. It means a lot to Mark. Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Carrie Anne Templeton
subject: Exciting end of year events at Forward you won't want to miss!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Party news you can use!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=1)
---
| Hello Forward Friends- I hope everyone had an amazing holiday break and is excited for the next one! As we approach the end of the year, reflecting on our wins and growth in 2025, we are also strategically planning for 2026. You can be a part of that growth by joining one of the events below! **Tues Dec 9th @ 7:30pm ET** -[National Volunteer Call](https://home.forwardparty.com/national_volunteer_call_20251209?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=2) If you haven't signed up for a volunteer program yet or just want national party updates join us to learn more. **Tues Dec 9th @ 8:30pm ET-**[She Runs, We Win](https://home.forwardparty.com/she_runs_we_windec92025?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=3) The Women's Committee is hosting an event in conjunction with the CEO of Vote, Run, Lead for women interested in running for office. **Thurs Dec 11th @ 6pm ET** \- [Run for Office w/ FWD](https://home.forwardparty.com/run_for_office_with_forward_party2_20251211?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=4) This webinar is important for anyone considering running for office next year. It covers the Forward Party endorsement process and includes tips and tricks for filing and campaigning. **Tues Dec 16th @ 7pm ET -**[End of Year Event](https://home.forwardparty.com/eoy_grassroots_event?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=5) A look back at our national success and a sneak peek at what we have in store for 2026- including some exciting candidates! | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/public_calendar?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=6 "CLICK FOR OUR PUBLIC EVENTS CALENDAR") [CLICK FOR OUR PUBLIC EVENTS CALENDAR](https://home.forwardparty.com/public_calendar?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=6)
---
_Volu_ _nteer_ _Spotlight:_
Our Volunteer of the month for December is **Kris Sun!** This young man is Vice President of the Young Forwardists committee and he handles all the training and organizing for our college chapters. When asked why he dedicates his time to Forward he had this to say: "I'm a pre-medicine student. Most people think that I should not be working in politics. In fact, both major parties conveyed to me that my choice of study contradicted their efforts. But Forward recognizes what I do as well: everyone deserves a voice in government. I'm proud to be in the Forward Party, working to make representation a reality."
If you've had an incredible experience with a volunteer and would like to nominate them for VOM please use this [form](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Cau9QZYSrELuaBTd-UPVTot-dsx8fWJ0UqA7b0sYK-DZjOukE3_eDG3LTn6H3lrB&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=7). We love our volunteers and want to recognize all their hard work!
As always, thank you for reading. I appreciate you and look _forward_ to seing you at an upcoming event!
Carrie Anne Templeton
[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=8)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=9) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=10) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=11) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=12) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_dec_1&n=13) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. I'm proud to be in the Forward Party, working to make representation a reality." If you've had an incredible experience with a volunteer and would like to nominate them for VOM please use this . We love our volunteers and want to recognize all their hard work! As always, thank you for reading. I appreciate you and look forward to seing you at an upcoming event! Carrie Anne Templeton Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

name: Marina Jenkins, NDRC
subject: This case affects more than just Louisiana’s fair map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Here’s where things stand and how you can help:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120698667/587078709/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjUxYTQ1LTE1ZDItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mCYL2aAHGmH-ripXAKWsShDzxwF__jz4PAUQGJxkaC0=&emci=ce9a0b41-f3d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=75b51a45-15d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, _The New York Times_ just made very clear what’s at stake when the Supreme Court rules on _Louisiana v. Callais_. And it’s not just the congressional map in Louisiana. | **_“Over the longer run, the fate of Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, which protects majority-minority districts, becomes a key variable. If the Supreme Court strikes it down, Republicans could easily redraw up to a dozen districts across the South.”_**
---
I can’t overstate the urgency of this moment, Peter. If the Supreme Court strikes down Louisiana’s Voting Rights Act-compliant congressional map, it would encourage anti-democracy extremists to attack districts across the country that keep communities of color intact — potentially denying Black voters their rightful representation at the ballot box on a massive scale.
So while we’re hoping for the best — that the Supreme Court preserves Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act and permanently restores a fair congressional map in Louisiana — we’re preparing for the worst.
**As we wait for the Court’s ruling, the NDRC is committed to the fight for a truly representative democracy where every voter can make their voice heard. But we need your continued support to ensure we’re ready to fight back to stop power grabs across the country.**
[**Please make a donation to keep up the fight for fair maps and fair representation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120698668/587078710/-1027206931?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SCOTUSPreview_email_20251205-NDRC-Tier1-SCOTUSPreview_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251205-NDRC-Tier1-SCOTUSPreview_&utm_campaign=SCOTUSPreview&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjUxYTQ1LTE1ZDItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mCYL2aAHGmH-ripXAKWsShDzxwF__jz4PAUQGJxkaC0=)

Elizabeth Warren is so right! Donald Trump is only the President because of the **OUTDATED, UNFAIR,** and **UNDEMOCRATIC** Electoral College.

[**REMEMBER:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70673?t=11&akid=23697%2E4449941%2Efdb807) Hillary Clinton won the popular vote in 2016, but her victory was overruled and handed to Trump — _because of the Electoral College._

[**We’ll be blunt, team. It needs to go IMMEDIATELY!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70673?t=12&akid=23697%2E4449941%2Efdb807)

So, we’re launching an urgent poll for Democrats in your area to gauge support for the Electoral College.
[ **Tell us: Do you think the Electoral College is undemocratic?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70673?t=13&akid=23697%2E4449941%2Efdb807)

[ **The Electoral College is a 238-year-old antiquated system that NO LONGER serves the American people.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70673?t=17&akid=23697%2E4449941%2Efdb807)
BUT, Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans know that they will **NEVER WIN another Presidential election** if we get rid of the Electoral College!

All they care about is holding onto power, and they will do whatever it takes to keep it – even if that means silencing voters...

[**Voting is an ESSENTIAL building block of our democracy, and when its integrity is compromised, so is our government.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70673?t=18&akid=23697%2E4449941%2Efdb807)

**We need 9,382 more responses from your area before midnight in order to gauge support. If we don’t hit our goal, it will make it incredibly difficult to formulate our strategy moving forward. Your response is crucial.**

name: Virginia Democrats
subject: What is Project 2025?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Part 1: Understanding Project 2025 and why it matters in Virginia

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120699828/587082331/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTgyMWEwOS0xOWQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9-BTNsybUNnbs97lg0NhZ7R4u6cvrrMEZVx8_yLpqQ=&emci=55d78f0d-2cd1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=7e821a09-19d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31008101)
---
Hi Peter, You've probably heard about Project 2025. Maybe you've seen headlines or caught references in the news. But what actually is it, and why should Virginians care? This is the first in a short series breaking down what Project 2025 really is, who's behind it, and what it means for our Commonwealth. **What is Project 2025? **
Project 2025 is a 900-page blueprint for reshaping the federal government under a conservative administration. It's not a campaign document. It's an implementation plan written by more than 400 people from conservative think tanks, legal organizations, and former Trump officials. **The goal?** Concentrate power in the executive branch, purge career civil servants, and install loyalists across federal agencies. Then use that power to roll back protections on everything from reproductive rights to environmental standards to voting access. **Who wrote it?**
The Heritage Foundation led the effort, but the authors include people from:
* The Federalist Society (the group that vetted Trump's Supreme Court picks)
* Alliance Defending Freedom (leading the charge against LGBTQ+ rights)
* America First Legal (Stephen Miller's organization)
* Former Trump administration officials

**Why does this matter in Virginia?**
Because, as we’ve unfortunately learned this year, federal policy doesn't stay in Washington. Project 2025's agenda would directly affect Virginians:
* **Reproductive freedom:** A national abortion ban or enforcement of the Comstock Act would override Virginia's protections.
* **Public education:** Eliminating the Department of Education would cut funding for Virginia schools and Title I programs.
* **Voting rights:** Weakening the Voting Rights Act and federal election oversight puts Virginia's progress at risk.
* **Environmental protections:** Rolling back EPA rules would affect the Chesapeake Bay, air quality, and coastal communities.

**What comes next? **
Even with Democratic control in Richmond, we can't protect Virginians from a federal government designed to override state progress. **That's why we're building a firewall.**
Virginia Democrats are working to protect our progress at the state level, but we need the resources to fight back against a federal agenda designed to steamroll states like ours. Your support today helps us:
* Educate voters about what's at stake.
* Defend our majorities in 2025 and beyond.
* Build the infrastructure to protect Virginia families from federal overreach.

[_**As Democrats, it’s our responsibility to continue exposing the people hoping to dismantle our democracy and predict their next move so we can stop them. Will you support our Virginia Democratic Party so we can continue bringing the fight to Republicans?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120699831/587082334/-2072720460?&refcode=E16533-20251205-Project2025-SL-GOP&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTgyMWEwOS0xOWQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9-BTNsybUNnbs97lg0NhZ7R4u6cvrrMEZVx8_yLpqQ=) | **************[Help us Fight Back](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120699833/587082336/-2072720460?&refcode=E16533-20251205-Project2025-SB-GOP&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTgyMWEwOS0xOWQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9-BTNsybUNnbs97lg0NhZ7R4u6cvrrMEZVx8_yLpqQ=)**************
---
In the next email, we'll break down Project 2025's specific policy goals and what they mean for Virginia families.
For now, the key takeaway is this: Project 2025 isn't a theoretical threat. It's a detailed plan written by people who've already reshaped the Supreme Court and rewritten voting maps. And they're not hiding it.
More soon,

Virginia Democrats

Virginia Democrats are working to protect our progress at the state level, but we need the resources to fight back against a federal agenda designed to steamroll states like ours. Your support today helps us: Educate voters about what's at stake. Defend our majorities in 2025 and beyond. Build the infrastructure to protect Virginia families from federal overreach. = | **********=************ In the next email, we'll break down Project 2025's specific policy goals and what they mean for Virginia families. For now, the key takeaway is this: Project 2025 isn't a theoretical threat. It's a detailed plan written by people who've already reshaped the Supreme Court and rewritten voting maps. And they're not hiding it. More soon, Virginia Democrats [content goes here] Forwarded this email? If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can . Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120699839/587082346/148511826?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWUzYWMyZS0xOWQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hfX6GYSeBvmX9x3fK67zBKjipBjuZnC2pFCq799Uc0U=)
Peter,

If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress.

All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.

If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Peter.

I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.

There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.

If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.

And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please:

**[Split a donation between George Whitesides and me. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. | = Peter, If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Peter. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. name: Team Cooper
subject: 1-Question Poll: Are you for reproductive freedom?
body:
Tell us where you stand >>>
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=108%2E124072%2EnpN0BK)
| **ONE-QUESTION POLL FOR ROY COOPER SUPPORTERS:** **Do you SUPPORT or OPPOSE protections for abortion rights and reproductive freedom?** | [SUPPORT](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_abortionpoll_120525/?source=em_RC_PET_AbortionPollEngagementRESEND_120525&t=7&akid=108%2E124072%2EnpN0BK) | [OPPOSE](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_abortionpoll_120525/?source=em_RC_PET_AbortionPollEngagementRESEND_120525&t=8&akid=108%2E124072%2EnpN0BK)
---|---
Roy Cooper has been a staunch defender of abortion rights and reproductive freedom in North Carolina, and as its next U.S. Senator, he’ll continue that advocacy.
As Governor, Roy vetoed an extreme Republican bill banning nearly all abortion care after 12 weeks of pregnancy. Rolled out during the night, Republicans pushed it through despite knowing that this ban was NOT what North Carolinians wanted.
**A clear majority in North Carolina support access to abortion. But our opponent doesn’t care.**
The extreme GOP wants to get between North Carolinians and their doctors. They don’t care that _folks in states with bans are nearly twice as likely to die during pregnancy or soon after giving birth._**Now compare that with Roy, who will be a trusted ally in the U.S. Senate for reproductive freedom._Tell us if you stand with him:_**
**[Do you SUPPORT or OPPOSE protections for abortion access and reproductive care?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_abortionpoll_120525/?source=em_RC_PET_AbortionPollEngagementRESEND_120525&t=9&akid=108%2E124072%2EnpN0BK)**
[SUPPORT](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_abortionpoll_120525/?source=em_RC_PET_AbortionPollEngagementRESEND_120525&t=10&akid=108%2E124072%2EnpN0BK) | [OPPOSE](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_abortionpoll_120525/?source=em_RC_PET_AbortionPollEngagementRESEND_120525&t=11&akid=108%2E124072%2EnpN0BK)
---|---
Thanks for responding,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=108%2E124072%2EnpN0BK)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=108%2E124072%2EnpN0BK)
---

[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=108%2E124072%2EnpN0BK)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=108%2E124072%2EnpN0BK)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: Need your thoughts on Trump’s second term
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, since the day Donald Trump’s second term began, hardworking Americans have been seeing – and feeling – the effects of his harmful agenda. Of his reckless tariffs. Of his authoritarian playbook. Of his plans to kick millions off of health insurance to fund another tax break for billionaires.
Well, on Election Day last month, voters sent a clear message at the ballot box: Bills are too high, the policies are too extreme, and it’s time to do something about it. Democrats won _big_ across the country and right here in Georgia.
**Now, new polls show Trump’s approval rating plummeting. Millions of Americans are voicing their disapproval – and before 2025 ends, I’m looking for you to add your voice as well on where you stand so far on Trump’s second term.**
**Please, friend, speak out before this new poll closes at midnight:**
**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

clean_body: | | | Friend, since the day Donald Trump’s second term began, hardworking Americans have been seeing – and feeling – the effects of his harmful agenda. Of his reckless tariffs. Of his authoritarian playbook. Of his plans to kick millions off of health insurance to fund another tax break for billionaires. Well, on Election Day last month, voters sent a clear message at the ballot box: Bills are too high, the policies are too extreme, and it’s time to do something about it. Democrats won big across the country and right here in Georgia. Now, new polls show Trump’s approval rating plummeting. Millions of Americans are voicing their disapproval – and before 2025 ends, I’m looking for you to add your voice as well on where you stand so far on Trump’s second term. Please, friend, speak out before this new poll closes at midnight: Do you approve of Donald Trump? | | | | Thank you for speaking out, Rev.
