# [HER AMERICA: She was saved. Now? She wants to save the planet, and American values.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=177691326&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3NjkxMzI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ5NzM5OTUsImV4cCI6MTc2NzU2NTk5NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.QBuDXztD-XaPt6gYYSkG0yONqll7s89S3jZXSA46wHg)
### Conservative. Christian-warrior. Sustainability advocate. Survivor. Meet the amazing Danielle Lindsay.
Dec 5
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=177691326&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3NjkxMzI2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDk3Mzk5NSwiZXhwIjoxNzY3NTY1OTk1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zmphlJtoWcr_h0EaRdmpj7z_W2NpCEk1icJoe0E6X0c&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=177691326&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3NjkxMzI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ5NzM5OTUsImV4cCI6MTc2NzU2NTk5NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.QBuDXztD-XaPt6gYYSkG0yONqll7s89S3jZXSA46wHg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=177691326&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3NjkxMzI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ5NzM5OTUsImV4cCI6MTc2NzU2NTk5NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.QBuDXztD-XaPt6gYYSkG0yONqll7s89S3jZXSA46wHg)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcG9saXRpYnJhd2wvcC9oZXItYW1lcmljYS1zaGUtd2FzLXNhdmVkLW5vdy1zaGU_.p6MGmrgVS3ZRT8UlpUUAluIEpy7eHUcArr6OzHqZY-E?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/her-america-she-was-saved-now-she?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

_**" I was in therapy to cope with the fact that I was never going to get better, never going to recover, never going back to college, never going to be much. Three months later, I'm at the White House meeting the President."**_
She shouldn't have survived.
Now, she lives for conserving American values, and our planet.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6eb9582e-0364-4513-b64d-113e3723b2f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Danielle's political career began at an early age. Born in Milwaukee, she always had a knack for the political landscape, with her equally vocal parents and fascination with an event for former Wisconsin Governor Scott Walker she attended when she was just eleven-years-old.
Come 2013, Twitter was born, and like many political buffs, Danielle couldn't resist. It was there she received the direct message that changed her life.
Turning Point USA and Charlie Kirk were in their inception phase. One of their initial invitations to join what was to become one of the most monumental movements of our time went to none other than young Danielle via Twitter.
And at just thirteen years old, she became a part of history.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..MJAX4pHQ_XeLZbQp_ZaCd80FjksJDQ9kj3RGbpO-Kzk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177691326)
For the entirety of her teenage years, Danielle travelled the country with Kirk, going to all the TPUSA events and being "captivated" by the star conservative debater.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/308ae570-e54e-4bbb-abf0-77e6b6b4e89f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"My mom just found my notebook from my first Turning Point conference in 2015. She was like, 'You were just absolutely enthralled with what was going on here.'" Danielle gushed.
_**" I fell in love with wanting to make my country that I loved a better place - and I've been doing that ever since."**_
She truly has - working on state legislature campaigns during her college years, serving as a White House intern, and now her true passion as the Director of Florida Young Republicans and the Florida Director for the American Conservation Coalition...
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/57a21311-86e6-4f05-9dcb-910a1c3173cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **In 1944, an experiment was done in this Nazi medical center ...**
Dear Reader,
In 1944, an experiment was done in **[this Nazi medical center](https://substack.com/redirect/57a21311-86e6-4f05-9dcb-910a1c3173cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ...**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/57a21311-86e6-4f05-9dcb-910a1c3173cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Take a look at the circled window in this photo...
A medical experiment commissioned by Adolf Hitler was done here in 1944. Our own U.S. government has ignored the important scientific results of this experiment.
Now, decades later, the results are finally being revealed to the public. And you will NOT believe what they expose.
**[Click here now to see them while they're still available](https://substack.com/redirect/57a21311-86e6-4f05-9dcb-910a1c3173cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
But hurry...
**[Click here now before we're forced to remove it from the web](https://substack.com/redirect/57a21311-86e6-4f05-9dcb-910a1c3173cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
Regards,
Emily Harper
Publisher, _Natural Health Response_
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/57a21311-86e6-4f05-9dcb-910a1c3173cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. The health implications of **[this shocking video](https://substack.com/redirect/57a21311-86e6-4f05-9dcb-910a1c3173cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** will leave you speechless. I highly recommend you **[watch it immediately](https://substack.com/redirect/57a21311-86e6-4f05-9dcb-910a1c3173cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** This could have a major impact on what you and your family know about healthcare. **[Watch this now](https://substack.com/redirect/57a21311-86e6-4f05-9dcb-910a1c3173cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
* * *
_**(Piece continues below)**_
It might seem like Danielle has always had it all figured out, and in certain ways she has, with her resolute belief in Conservatism and Christian faith, but the road itself was far from easy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bbcba048-7254-42b2-8355-cba298ea48cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Forced to shift trajectories after Trump lost the 2020 election and her internship to the job pipeline evaporated, Danielle worked in finance in Orlando for a few years, and actually stepped away from the world of politics -- until a friend asked her to join an American Conservation Coalition event.
That moment changed everything.
It opened her eyes, mesmerized by the grandiose and divine qualities of our natural world, Danielle asked herself "..why wouldn't I want to dedicate my life to preserving God's creation... and as I got more religious - I ended up converting to Catholicism during that time as well," she recounted. "I just dedicated my whole life to protecting the Lord's creation."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..MJAX4pHQ_XeLZbQp_ZaCd80FjksJDQ9kj3RGbpO-Kzk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177691326)
Yep, conservation. Not usually the common passion for Republicans, but Danielle has never contended with what's common. She's more concerned with what she believes to be right.
In her day-to-day, you'll find her managing all the operations for conservation field events for the Coalition's twelve branches, organizing thousands of volunteers across Pensacola to the Florida Keys, and all young Republican outreach.
"The Young Republicans of Florida has done the - I think - most insane job of outreach last election season and now during this election season. Just getting out and making millions and millions of voter contacts."
_**" We're absolutely blowing the Democrats out of the water, and a lot of it is female led, which is so beautiful."**_
Not only is the movement female-driven, an often unnoticed aspect of modern-day conservatism, but it's a movement that continues to withstand great evil, something Danielle can attest to as both a Christian and founding contributor to Turning Point USA.
"I think a lot of people see themselves in Charlie and what he was doing."
"When you see someone who you've known for over a decade - a friend - get murdered on camera, it becomes very real. Seeing someone who thinks the same as you get murdered on camera for the things he believed, it's like, 'Oh man, that was me.'"
Since then, she's, through her work with the Florida Young Republicans specifically, felt the tectonic plates of fate churn in response to the tragedy from September.
"We've had a surge of people just asking how to get more involved, coming to our events, but...they want even more than just to come to events. They want to make a difference. They want to be a force in their community."
"I think it's something that Charlie would love to see - his legacy live on in this passion and veracity for truth and justice."
Young Republicans are taking the helm for patriotism along with Danielle, but what of Danielle's passion for conservatism, and her work as the Director for Florida conservation?
What of those stereotypes that conservatives don't care about the planet? How does she combat those ideas?
"It's just historically not been a conservative issue," Danielle said. "Which is crazy. because what is _not_ conservative about wanting to conserve the most beautiful country on this planet for our kids and our grandkids?....This is the most beautiful country on the planet. Here's why we should save it. Here's why it's a health risk. Here's why it could also be a pro-life issue."
"Conservation and the protection of our earth hits on so many different issues. It's not good for us in any way, shape, or form, physically, spiritually, emotionally, to live on a planet that is not healthy or protected or conserved."

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d72abb91-e7ff-455a-9f68-f3c69120e61c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Coalition is responsible for countless weekly beach clean-ups and other events in collaborating with National Park Service rangers, helping protect the state's breathtaking landscape and wildlife.
Danielle is also on the MABA, the Make America Beautiful Again committee, with seven other conservation organizations, committed to preserving the nation in all its glory.
Although facing countless barriers against real sustainability, the one thing Danielle holds tight to is hope. There's much to be done, but Danielle sees every step.
"It starts in communities." Danielle said. "We need to encourage people. We believe in market-based solutions for our climate environmental problems. We need innovation over regulation, and we need to work hand in hand with farmers, business owners, and community leaders to protect our natural wonders. There's really no other way."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..MJAX4pHQ_XeLZbQp_ZaCd80FjksJDQ9kj3RGbpO-Kzk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177691326)
Danielle's tenacity comes across as innate, an integral part of her natural character, which is true, but it has undoubtedly been emboldened and strengthened by the harrowing journey it took for her to get here.
Because the truth is, Danielle might have never gotten _here_.
In 2019, she received her second traumatic brain injury. A triple major and majorly involved in school, Danielle was rocketed back to an elementary school learning level. She lost everything, even her ability to walk freely. The physical and emotional pain -- having to step away from college -- it all became too much for Danielle.

_**" I was in therapy to cope with the fact that I was never going to get better, never going to recover, never going back to college, never going to be much."**_

There was seemingly no way out.
_**" Three months later, I'm at the White House meeting the President."**_
That is, for someone without faith, for it was in this period where Danielle found herself "on fire for the Lord."
"I'm a registered Republican, but above all else, I'm a Catholic Christian."
It's that fire from tragedy that formed Danielle's entire perspective, and continues to guide her in her work today.
"It's truly the best thing that ever happened to me. And I'm so blessed that now I get to be a living example of the miracles of Christ and the goodness of God."
Her faith touches everything she does, and is how Danielle deals with stereotypes and hatred, how she combats opposing views and continues to stand tall in her conservative values even with so much verbal and politically violent attacks conservatives face on a regular basis _._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/43163fb9-2e92-4c7c-a721-0f95d1cb64c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
She isn't scared to speak her mind, because she is "surrounded by the armor of God."
Danielle's words to Republicans - to conservative women near and far leading the charge and igniting change in communities: The time is now.
"This is our time to shine and really and really drive home what it means to be an American, if anything. Not even just a conservative, but what it means to protect freedom and American values and culture."
This is Danielle.
This is her story.
And this land we stand on - with visionaries founded in faith and relentless strength - is _Her America_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/14558287-1805-427d-a06b-6b17175c58fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

clean_body: Conservative. Christian-warrior. Sustainability advocate. Survivor. Meet the amazing Danielle Lindsay. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Conservative. Christian-warrior. Sustainability advocate. Survivor. Meet the amazing Danielle Lindsay. Dec 5 | | | | | | | | | | | " I was in therapy to cope with the fact that I was never going to get better, never going to recover, never going back to college, never going to be much. Three months later, I'm at the White House meeting the President." She shouldn't have survived. Now, she lives for conserving American values, and our planet. | | ---|---|--- Danielle's political career began at an early age. Born in Milwaukee, she always had a knack for the political landscape, with her equally vocal parents and fascination with an event for former Wisconsin Governor Scott Walker she attended when she was just eleven-years-old. Come 2013, Twitter was born, and like many political buffs, Danielle couldn't resist. It was there she received the direct message that changed her life. Turning Point USA and Charlie Kirk were in their inception phase. One of their initial invitations to join what was to become one of the most monumental movements of our time went to none other than young Danielle via Twitter. And at just thirteen years old, she became a part of history. For the entirety of her teenage years, Danielle travelled the country with Kirk, going to all the TPUSA events and being "captivated" by the star conservative debater. | | ---|---|--- "My mom just found my notebook from my first Turning Point conference in 2015. She was like, 'You were just absolutely enthralled with what was going on here.'" Danielle gushed. " I fell in love with wanting to make my country that I loved a better place - and I've been doing that ever since." She truly has - working on state legislature campaigns during her college years, serving as a White House intern, and now her true passion as the Director of Florida Young Republicans and the Florida Director for the American Conservation Coalition... A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) In 1944, an experiment was done in this Nazi medical center ... Dear Reader, In 1944, an experiment was done in ... | | ---|---|--- Take a look at the circled window in this photo... A medical experiment commissioned by Adolf Hitler was done here in 1944. Our own U.S. government has ignored the important scientific results of this experiment. Now, decades later, the results are finally being revealed to the public. And you will NOT believe what they expose. . But hurry... . Regards, Emily Harper Publisher, Natural Health Response P.S. The health implications of will leave you speechless. I highly recommend you . This could have a major impact on what you and your family know about healthcare. . (Piece continues below) It might seem like Danielle has always had it all figured out, and in certain ways she has, with her resolute belief in Conservatism and Christian faith, but the road itself was far from easy. | | ---|---|--- Forced to shift trajectories after Trump lost the 2020 election and her internship to the job pipeline evaporated, Danielle worked in finance in Orlando for a few years, and actually stepped away from the world of politics -- until a friend asked her to join an American Conservation Coalition event. That moment changed everything. It opened her eyes, mesmerized by the grandiose and divine qualities of our natural world, Danielle asked herself "..why wouldn't I want to dedicate my life to preserving God's creation... and as I got more religious - I ended up converting to Catholicism during that time as well," she recounted. "I just dedicated my whole life to protecting the Lord's creation." Yep, conservation. Not usually the common passion for Republicans, but Danielle has never contended with what's common. She's more concerned with what she believes to be right. In her day-to-day, you'll find her managing all the operations for conservation field events for the Coalition's twelve branches, organizing thousands of volunteers across Pensacola to the Florida Keys, and all young Republican outreach. "The Young Republicans of Florida has done the - I think - most insane job of outreach last election season and now during this election season. Just getting out and making millions and millions of voter contacts." " We're absolutely blowing the Democrats out of the water, and a lot of it is female led, which is so beautiful." Not only is the movement female-driven, an often unnoticed aspect of modern-day conservatism, but it's a movement that continues to withstand great evil, something Danielle can attest to as both a Christian and founding contributor to Turning Point USA. "I think a lot of people see themselves in Charlie and what he was doing." "When you see someone who you've known for over a decade - a friend - get murdered on camera, it becomes very real. Seeing someone who thinks the same as you get murdered on camera for the things he believed, it's like, 'Oh man, that was me.'" Since then, she's, through her work with the Florida Young Republicans specifically, felt the tectonic plates of fate churn in response to the tragedy from September. "We've had a surge of people just asking how to get more involved, coming to our events, but...they want even more than just to come to events. They want to make a difference. They want to be a force in their community." "I think it's something that Charlie would love to see - his legacy live on in this passion and veracity for truth and justice." Young Republicans are taking the helm for patriotism along with Danielle, but what of Danielle's passion for conservatism, and her work as the Director for Florida conservation? What of those stereotypes that conservatives don't care about the planet? How does she combat those ideas? "It's just historically not been a conservative issue," Danielle said. "Which is crazy. because what is not conservative about wanting to conserve the most beautiful country on this planet for our kids and our grandkids?....This is the most beautiful country on the planet. Here's why we should save it. Here's why it's a health risk. Here's why it could also be a pro-life issue." "Conservation and the protection of our earth hits on so many different issues. It's not good for us in any way, shape, or form, physically, spiritually, emotionally, to live on a planet that is not healthy or protected or conserved." | | ---|---|--- The Coalition is responsible for countless weekly beach clean-ups and other events in collaborating with National Park Service rangers, helping protect the state's breathtaking landscape and wildlife. Danielle is also on the MABA, the Make America Beautiful Again committee, with seven other conservation organizations, committed to preserving the nation in all its glory. Although facing countless barriers against real sustainability, the one thing Danielle holds tight to is hope. There's much to be done, but Danielle sees every step. "It starts in communities." Danielle said. "We need to encourage people. We believe in market-based solutions for our climate environmental problems. We need innovation over regulation, and we need to work hand in hand with farmers, business owners, and community leaders to protect our natural wonders. There's really no other way." Danielle's tenacity comes across as innate, an integral part of her natural character, which is true, but it has undoubtedly been emboldened and strengthened by the harrowing journey it took for her to get here. Because the truth is, Danielle might have never gotten here. In 2019, she received her second traumatic brain injury. A triple major and majorly involved in school, Danielle was rocketed back to an elementary school learning level. She lost everything, even her ability to walk freely. The physical and emotional pain -- having to step away from college -- it all became too much for Danielle. " I was in therapy to cope with the fact that I was never going to get better, never going to recover, never going back to college, never going to be much." There was seemingly no way out. " Three months later, I'm at the White House meeting the President." That is, for someone without faith, for it was in this period where Danielle found herself "on fire for the Lord." "I'm a registered Republican, but above all else, I'm a Catholic Christian." It's that fire from tragedy that formed Danielle's entire perspective, and continues to guide her in her work today. "It's truly the best thing that ever happened to me. And I'm so blessed that now I get to be a living example of the miracles of Christ and the goodness of God." Her faith touches everything she does, and is how Danielle deals with stereotypes and hatred, how she combats opposing views and continues to stand tall in her conservative values even with so much verbal and politically violent attacks conservatives face on a regular basis . | | ---|---|--- She isn't scared to speak her mind, because she is "surrounded by the armor of God." Danielle's words to Republicans - to conservative women near and far leading the charge and igniting change in communities: The time is now. "This is our time to shine and really and really drive home what it means to be an American, if anything. Not even just a conservative, but what it means to protect freedom and American values and culture." This is Danielle. This is her story. And this land we stand on - with visionaries founded in faith and relentless strength - is Her America. | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Cori Bush
subject: My ask this International Volunteer Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251205_intlvolunteerday_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251205_intlvolunteerday_act]
Peter,
On this International Volunteer Day, I want to speak from the heart.
Our movement has never been powered by corporations or Super PACs. It’s powered by you, people who believe every family deserves safety, dignity, and a government that centers the most vulnerable.
You’ve seen what we’re up against. AIPAC and Republican megadonors spent millions trying to silence me and this movement because we speak the truth about justice, peace, and protecting our communities from violence, whether it comes from gun manufacturers, policing systems, or foreign governments.
But here’s what they can’t stand: Every time they try to drown us out with money, we rise up louder. In fact, we’re spearheading the current movement of politicians turning away from AIPAC.
And volunteers like you are the backbone of that resistance. Grassroots action is how we consistently outdo megadonor money, and it’s how we build lasting change.
On this day, I’m asking you to give your time, your energy, and your voice. Whether it’s phone banking, knocking doors, texting voters, or bringing new people into this movement, your contribution matters.
Will you sign up to volunteer with our team? [https://www.coribush.org/volunteer/]
The work we do right this minute has the potential to have a much longer-lasting impact.
SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER [https://www.coribush.org/volunteer/]
Thank you for being part of this movement. I genuinely mean it.
In solidarity,
Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251205_intlvolunteerday_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251205_intlvolunteerday_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251205_intlvolunteerday_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251205_intlvolunteerday_act&recurring=1]
Paid for by Cori For Us
Cori For Us
PO Box 12404
St. Louis, MO 63132
United States

| ****[**Epstein Files Update!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36607&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1ZMXNUOTIyck1hWSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=65ef157dd60fd06882dd032e78abfe0d3d0bba01db33d6d597e83fbb3c8f5f7c)**** **[
](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36607&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1ZMXNUOTIyck1hWSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=65ef157dd60fd06882dd032e78abfe0d3d0bba01db33d6d597e83fbb3c8f5f7c)****Judicial Watch Sues DOJ for Epstein Records Subpoenaed by House Committee** The U.S. Department of Justice is sitting on information about Jeffrey Epstein that the public should have.We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) [lawsuit](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36620&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWhvdXNlLWVwc3RlaW4tc3VicG9lbmFzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wNDEyMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6651124b5d984e64f7c03880608de7bebfcfd55e09c4a91c1af6b02ad711517a) against the Justice Department for records subpoenaed by the U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform regarding Epstein, the accused sex trafficker ([Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36620&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWhvdXNlLWVwc3RlaW4tc3VicG9lbmFzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wNDEyMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6651124b5d984e64f7c03880608de7bebfcfd55e09c4a91c1af6b02ad711517a) (No. 1:25-cv-04123 )).The Justice Department should immediately release this information. Americans deserve the truth. It’s time to end the leaks and the guessing games.We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Justice Department failed to respond to an August 22, 2025, FOIA request for:
* All records provided to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform or any member thereof in response to the subpoena transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or about August 5, 2025.
* All records relied upon during the preparation of any response to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform subpoena transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or about August 5, 2025.
* All records of communication between Attorney General Bondi or Deputy Attorney General Blanche and any other individual or entity regarding the Department’s response to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform subpoena transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or about August 5, 2025.

In August 2025, James Comer (R-KY), chairman of the House Oversight Committee, issued [deposition subpoenas](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36621&F=H&&hash=f779afdf8246567593c4fa3454a4697e7dde0ecc923bf590dd8cae66d2c7b3c6) to former high-level officials including Bill and Hillary Clinton; former U.S. Attorneys General William Barr, Alberto Gonzales, Jeff Sessions, Loretta Lynch, Eric Holder and Merrick Garland; and former FBI Directors Robert Mueller and James Comey — seeking testimony and documents related to the investigation of Epstein. Additionally, a subpoena was issued to the Justice Department for records related to Epstein. For example, the subpoena [cover letter](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36622&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vdmVyc2lnaHQuaG91c2UuZ292L3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDI1LzA4LzIwMjUuMDguMDUtU3VicG9lbmEtQ292ZXItTGV0dGVycy5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8b17aa2acdc8602c6db774253311751741d7010b1f680e50cd668904014ec3bf) to Gonzales states:On July 23, 2025, the Subcommittee on Federal Law Enforcement of the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform (“Committee”) unanimously voted to approve a motion directing the Committee to authorize and issue a subpoena to you for a deposition. Your tenure as U.S. Attorney General, from 2005 to late 2007, coincided with a time period when the FBI investigated Jeffrey Epstein for sex crimes, an Assistant U.S. Attorney in the Southern District of Florida prepared a draft 60-count indictment of Mr. Epstein, and the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of Florida offered a plea bargain to Mr. Epstein, leading to the signing of Mr. Epstein’s non-prosecution agreement only one week after you left office. Pursuant to this direction, please see the attached subpoena for you to appear at a deposition on August 26, 2025.On July 6, 2019, federal authorities arrested Mr. Jeffrey Epstein and two days later an indictment was unsealed in the U.S. District Court for the Southern District for New York charging him with sex trafficking of minors and conspiracy to engage in sex trafficking of minors. According to the indictment, Mr. Epstein sexually exploited and abused dozens of minor girls at his homes in Manhattan, Palm Beach, and other locations. Among other things, the indictment alleged that Mr. Epstein enticed girls as young as 14 years old to engage in sex acts with him in exchange for money. This was not the first time that Mr. Epstein had been investigated for committing sex crimes. In 2008, he pled guilty in Florida state court to two prostitution offenses, and, in exchange, he and his co-conspirators received immunity from federal prosecution through a non-prosecution agreement that was negotiated during your time as Attorney General. We have been actively pursuing details of the Epstein case.In October, we filed a FOIA [lawsuit](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36623&F=H&&hash=1f160495f40580e62107f36b8a6f5191d820a8a07818f2f5f209f644354b2466) against the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) for records involving any role Epstein might have played in connection with the agency, his business dealings, travel, victim or witness information, and records concerning his death.In September, we [sued](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36089&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9qLWNvbW11bmljYXRpb25zLXdpdGgtYXhpb3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2aa6ae8546034db5938f9b71ca8b7c3b2292a55b711c36adfdda744baf68f84d) the Justice Department for communication the department had with the media outlet Axios regarding the outlet’s “exclusives” on the release of audio of then-President Joe Biden’s August 2023 interview with then-Special Counsel Robert Hur regarding Biden’s handling of secret documents and the July 2025 memo that states there is no Jeffrey Epstein “client list.”In a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit, a “[joint status report](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=35630&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZXBzdGVpbi1yZWNvcmRzLXBvc3NpYmxlLXJlbGVhc2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b449400eac0d916371db15a3596fe82d8d361d4735250b228437feac40b85126)” filed on July 7 in federal court reported that the Justice Department and the FBI were continuing to search for and review records in response to our FOIA lawsuit for records regarding Epstein. The lawsuit requests any records on the identities of clients or associates of Epstein. The Justice Department’s disclosure is at odds with the leaked, unsigned and undated [Justice Department/FBI memo](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=35616&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL21lZGlhLzE0MDcwMDEvZGw/aW5saW5lJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=805564b89b9de3b63a7154eca9cf68f7c0d73088102489da1dec1cdd26b511c3) that suggests no more Epstein records would be disclosed to the American public. The memo was first disclosed late on [July 6](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=35617&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXhpb3MuY29tLzIwMjUvMDcvMDcvamVmZnJleS1lcHN0ZWluLXN1aWNpZGUtY2xpZW50LWxpc3QtdHJ1bXAtYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=fa9f7a016f7f0247272d9c58a424005a28d4a5323460d8a8305c69add0c501ac).Also in July, we [sued](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=35639&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmJpLXJlY29yZHMtdmlyZ2luaWEtZ2l1ZmZyZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=2702ac15046638302743f991975b42a7d89c189d26cbb74323ab097de96d1351) the Justice Department for all interviews and other records provided to the FBI by Epstein victim Virginia Louise Giuffre, who [reportedly](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=35625&F=H&&hash=3443bfa78b61f2c329ced639a3d16f3480dab4ccd197c059fc6d44c94f2a086c) committed suicide on April 25, 2025.**Judicial Watch Sues for Jack Smith’s Emails Targeting Donald Trump** We are working to find the communications between former Special Counsel Jack Smith and the state and federal actors who took part in the lawfare against President Donald Trump. The American people deserve transparency about the about the abuses committed against Trump and other Americans.We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) [lawsuit](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36625&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphY2stc21pdGgtZW1haWxzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzg0OS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e0c1b6540075a7ac8884db5912be78c315ab3db0c2ed744f5924a8c3ea67b3e8) against the U.S. Department of Justice for Smith’s emails with officials in Georgia, New York, and the White House, plus congressional and law enforcement offices regarding his investigation into then President-elect Donald Trump ([Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36625&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphY2stc21pdGgtZW1haWxzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzg0OS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e0c1b6540075a7ac8884db5912be78c315ab3db0c2ed744f5924a8c3ea67b3e8) (No. 1:25-cv-03849)).We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Justice Department failed to respond to two FOIA requests. The first, on November 13, 2024, asks for:
* All emails of Special Counsel Jack Smith between November 5, 2024, and November 13, 2024.

On November 21, 2024, we requested:
* All communications of any current or former member of the Smith’s office since November 1, 2022, regarding investigation into President-elect Trump, including those with:
* Any New York State governmental or law enforcement office
* Fulton County District Attorney’s office or Georgia secretary of State’s office
* White House, Congressional or Senate office
* Any federal law enforcement or government office

Smith [reportedly](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36626&F=H&&hash=d8256c1a62f7a0b987c8ea559d874cfb673989ceed661424eead0a5e23d0ee10) coordinated prosecutions of Trump with Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg, New York Attorney General Letitia James, and Fulton County, Georgia, District Attorney Fani Willis. The House Judiciary Committee recently [subpoenaed](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36627&F=H&&hash=10e874831ee9222e70c81c0eecf0b46465604cdec4f36b986b09bd2c62832507) Smith for a deposition about the federal prosecutions he brought against Trump during the Biden administration.We are a national leader in exposing the lawfare and abuse targeting Trump and other American citizens.In June 2025, we [sued](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=35570&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29sbHVzaW9uLWRvY3MtamFjay1zbWl0aC1vcGVyYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=67a47db75f1dc0c8c81a7c8bf7ab587ae8e4a5f6f20cc0f3c62837320fa7dc56) Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes for her communications with Smith ([Judicial Watch v. Kristin Mayes and Arizona Department of Law](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=35555&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbWF5ZXMtc21pdGgtdHJ1bXAtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyMDY3NC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=21e9a3ac51b9cb50e69e91f003ca09d966b488bc15dda1b879c99f201983ff6a) (CV 2025-020674).In March 2025, we [sued](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=34878&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWlzY29uZHVjdC1ieS1qYWNrLXNtaXRoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9c0f8e65071737ec6468eb1b53dd0de4c4bbb372bb0e9bae77f911ad41485721) the Justice Department for details of any investigations, inquiries, or referrals concerning potential misconduct of any person working for Smith ([Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=34869&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphY2stc21pdGhzLXRlYW0tY29tcGxhaW50LTAwODAxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=0974c21646e954394a1dab2db013a795537fa3d9abe230d6b3fce9b73f596e83) (No. 1:25-cv-00801)).Also in March, Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis [was ordered](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=34767&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYW50aS10cnVtcC1jb2xsdXNpb24tcmVjb3Jkcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=7775b31bdd527fd4a3ed272c2df8968e6febe2f5c00f8e5a753b9431d67c4bad) to turn over 212 pages of records to a state court judge. The court also ordered Willis to detail how the records were found and the reason for withholding them from the public. The records were belatedly found in response to a Judicial Watch request and lawsuit for communications with Smith and the House January 6 Committee ([Judicial Watch Inc. v. Fani Willis et al.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=31606&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtd2lsbGlzLWphY2stc21pdGgtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMjgwNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=688508329e21ad3fd5d66d7b6b7b16c9328876a6b96289c9cabbaa143cb6d8eb) (No. 24-CV-002805)).**New Air Marshal Assistant Director has a Questionable Past** If you’re a frequent traveler you won’t be comforted by personnel moves in the Federal Air Marshall Service, as our Corruption Chronicles blog [reports](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36619&F=H&&hash=c29ceaeb38f2745a1e889cccb803b0f8611e693a026e440cf99c6865ab4263e9).In the latest controversy to rock the Federal Air Marshal Service (FAMS), an agency veteran, who created a wasteful VIP Congressional Concierge and oversaw a surveillance program that put Americans—including Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard—with opposing political views on a terror watchlist, has been promoted to assistant director. His name is Serge V. Potapov, and he has risen through the ranks at FAMS despite playing a key role in highly questionable programs and a documented history of misconduct that put him at the center of various investigations over the years, according to agency documents reviewed by Judicial Watch. Now Potapov, a former U.S. Marine who recently served as a counselor to Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem, is second in command at FAMS which operates under the Transportation Security Administration (TSA), created after 9/11 to prevent another terrorist attack. Both agencies function under the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) and have been plagued by controversy and mismanagement that has left the nation vulnerable from a security standpoint, say multiple DHS sources interviewed by Judicial Watch over the years.FAMS in particular has experienced tremendous instability with [four different directors](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=30097&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLXJlcGxhY2VzLWFpci1tYXJzaGFsLWRpcmVjdG9yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=89247dcacef2bf6efafc36dc5a257a1c658fce4437178d1543528cc10d2fb5f3) in around as many years and flagrant mismanagement that includes controversial deployments of the uniquely skilled law enforcement officers to the Mexican border to perform duties unrelated to transportation, such as welfare checks, hospital watch and chauffeuring illegal immigrants. TSA has admitted it [does not know the operational impact ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=32986&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHNhLW1leGljYW4tYm9yZGVyLWFpci1tYXJzaGFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=0f36b44c7673a775a47170b8c376f4a742018509a01a6f0e969cc4c903231fdf)that the air marshal border deployments had on aviation security. During the chaos last year FAMS named a deputy director, Pauline (Polly) Hanson, with a shady history that includes being investigated for fraud and conflict of interest as chief of the Amtrak Police, a federal law enforcement agency of about 500 charged with protecting the nation’s railroad system. Hanson’s appointment rattled many inside FAMS and raised questions about the criteria to qualify for the top-secret clearance required for the position. Hanson [stepped down](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=33005&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9saWNlLWNoaWVmLWludmVzdGlnYXRlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b584dd83863fff5e7645017bf9c5ae0bd261f93a6cf6110caf8ae9fd776b5eac) after a few weeks on the job because Judicial Watch exposed her record, which was brought to our attention by the Air Marshal National Council, the union that represents thousands of agents nationwide and has uncovered a multitude of problems at the agency in recent years.Now, the union is battling against another highly questionable figure quietly elevated to assistant director at the ailing agency. As of this week Potapov is Assistant Administrator at FAMS despite a lengthy history of wrongdoing. His misconduct began at the Federal Air Marshal Training Center in New Jersey where he simulated shooting a female instructor in the head, kicked her during training, pulled her hair and told women “You don’t belong here,” according to documents provided to Judicial Watch by the Air Marshal National Council. Potapov was suspended and involuntarily transferred to the Philadelphia Field Office before being promoted to help lead the Insider Threat Unit, which got blasted in a DHS audit for its many failures during his leadership. An agency insider told Judicial Watch Potapov helped build a unit later condemned as structurally broken. Yet in 2020 he was promoted to Assistant Special Agent in Charge in Washington D.C. where he helped create a special [VIP Congressional Concierge](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=28364&F=H&&hash=315323fa3594e4eafb004f5c768f1b1c47a1ca1e68055e874f596f554a84d211) that pulled air marshals off high-risk flights so members of Congress could get extra protection on flights that did not meet the threat criteria, usually determined by the FBI, for air marshals. In 2021 Judicial Watch exposed the program, reporting that FAMS were yanked from a high-risk flight so California Congresswoman Maxine Waters could have extra security during a trip to Minnesota though she was already covered by a four-man detail consisting of two Capitol Police officers and two Secret Service agents. The story led to the program’s elimination, DHS sources confirmed.After launching the outrageous VIP Congressional Concierge, Potapov was promoted to executive director of flight operations, which oversaw another scandal-plagued program called Quiet Skies that secretly surveilled Americans on flights in the name of preventing terrorism. Hundreds of Americans, including then Hawaii Congresswoman Gabbard, were put on a watchlist and deemed threats to national security for holding political views against the Biden administration. In fact, Gabbard was added to the Quiet Skies program on July 23, 2024, one day after she criticized the Biden administration in an interview. The Trump administration ended the Quiet Skies program over the summer and in the fall a [Senate Homeland Security committee](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78130&L=36629&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaHNnYWMuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi93cC1jb250ZW50L3VwbG9hZHMvT3BlbmluZy1TdGF0ZW1lbnQtUGF1bC0yMDI1LTA5LTMwLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=72f99163f4ad70287654ce8ccb30ef9d7d622a426c80cc920f4e6b0493d21e1d) confirmed the Biden administration weaponized the watch list against everyday Americans, deeming them threats to national security simply for holding opposing political views. As Executive Director of Flight Operations in 2023, Potapov oversaw Quiet Skies and all global FAMS deployments, making him a strange choice to help lead the agency.In an internal memo announcing Potapov as his number two guy, FAMS Director Brian C. Belcher fails to mention his sordid past, instead promoting him as a 23-year FAMS veteran who has demonstrated “exceptional leadership and dedication to our mission of safeguarding the nation’s transportation system.” Belcher also praises Potapov’s expertise and commitment to operational excellence that make him uniquely qualified to serve in this leadership position. The reality is much different, says David Londo, president of the Air Marshal National Council, who says many inside the agency are outraged. “His career provides a clear example of systemic breakdowns in federal accountability, leadership vetting, and taxpayer stewardship,” Londo said, pointing to Potapov’s court-confirmed misconduct, failures documented in federal audits, warnings from a congressional investigative unit and widespread internal concerns.Until next week,

clean_body: | | | ** | | Watch Sues DOJ for Epstein Records Subpoenaed by House Committee The U.S. Department of Justice is sitting on information about Jeffrey Epstein that the public should have.We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) against the Justice Department for records subpoenaed by the U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform regarding Epstein, the accused sex trafficker ( (No. 1:25-cv-04123 )).The Justice Department should immediately release this information. Americans deserve the truth. It’s time to end the leaks and the guessing games.We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Justice Department failed to respond to an August 22, 2025, FOIA request for: All records provided to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform or any member thereof in response to the subpoena transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or about August 5, 2025. All records relied upon during the preparation of any response to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform subpoena transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or about August 5, 2025. All records of communication between Attorney General Bondi or Deputy Attorney General Blanche and any other individual or entity regarding the Department’s response to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform subpoena transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or about August 5, 2025. In August 2025, James Comer (R-KY), chairman of the House Oversight Committee, issued to former high-level officials including Bill and Hillary Clinton; former U.S. Attorneys General William Barr, Alberto Gonzales, Jeff Sessions, Loretta Lynch, Eric Holder and Merrick Garland; and former FBI Directors Robert Mueller and James Comey — seeking testimony and documents related to the investigation of Epstein. Additionally, a subpoena was issued to the Justice Department for records related to Epstein. For example, the subpoena to Gonzales states:On July 23, 2025, the Subcommittee on Federal Law Enforcement of the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform (“Committee”) unanimously voted to approve a motion directing the Committee to authorize and issue a subpoena to you for a deposition. Your tenure as U.S. Attorney General, from 2005 to late 2007, coincided with a time period when the FBI investigated Jeffrey Epstein for sex crimes, an Assistant U.S. Attorney in the Southern District of Florida prepared a draft 60-count indictment of Mr. Epstein, and the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of Florida offered a plea bargain to Mr. Epstein, leading to the signing of Mr. Epstein’s non-prosecution agreement only one week after you left office. Pursuant to this direction, please see the attached subpoena for you to appear at a deposition on August 26, 2025.On July 6, 2019, federal authorities arrested Mr. Jeffrey Epstein and two days later an indictment was unsealed in the U.S. District Court for the Southern District for New York charging him with sex trafficking of minors and conspiracy to engage in sex trafficking of minors. According to the indictment, Mr. Epstein sexually exploited and abused dozens of minor girls at his homes in Manhattan, Palm Beach, and other locations. Among other things, the indictment alleged that Mr. Epstein enticed girls as young as 14 years old to engage in sex acts with him in exchange for money. This was not the first time that Mr. Epstein had been investigated for committing sex crimes. In 2008, he pled guilty in Florida state court to two prostitution offenses, and, in exchange, he and his co-conspirators received immunity from federal prosecution through a non-prosecution agreement that was negotiated during your time as Attorney General. We have been actively pursuing details of the Epstein case.In October, we filed a FOIA against the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) for records involving any role Epstein might have played in connection with the agency, his business dealings, travel, victim or witness information, and records concerning his death.In September, we the Justice Department for communication the department had with the media outlet Axios regarding the outlet’s “exclusives” on the release of audio of then-President Joe Biden’s August 2023 interview with then-Special Counsel Robert Hur regarding Biden’s handling of secret documents and the July 2025 memo that states there is no Jeffrey Epstein “client list.”In a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit, a “” filed on July 7 in federal court reported that the Justice Department and the FBI were continuing to search for and review records in response to our FOIA lawsuit for records regarding Epstein. The lawsuit requests any records on the identities of clients or associates of Epstein. The Justice Department’s disclosure is at odds with the leaked, unsigned and undated that suggests no more Epstein records would be disclosed to the American public. The memo was first disclosed late on in July, we the Justice Department for all interviews and other records provided to the FBI by Epstein victim Virginia Louise Giuffre, who committed suicide on April 25, 2025.Judicial Watch Sues for Jack Smith’s Emails Targeting Donald Trump We are working to find the communications between former Special Counsel Jack Smith and the state and federal actors who took part in the lawfare against President Donald Trump. The American people deserve transparency about the about the abuses committed against Trump and other Americans.We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) against the U.S. Department of Justice for Smith’s emails with officials in Georgia, New York, and the White House, plus congressional and law enforcement offices regarding his investigation into then President-elect Donald Trump ( (No. 1:25-cv-03849)).We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Justice Department failed to respond to two FOIA requests. The first, on November 13, 2024, asks for: All emails of Special Counsel Jack Smith between November 5, 2024, and November 13, 2024. On November 21, 2024, we requested: All communications of any current or former member of the Smith’s office since November 1, 2022, regarding investigation into President-elect Trump, including those with: Any New York State governmental or law enforcement office Fulton County District Attorney’s office or Georgia secretary of State’s office White House, Congressional or Senate office Any federal law enforcement or government office Smith coordinated prosecutions of Trump with Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg, New York Attorney General Letitia James, and Fulton County, Georgia, District Attorney Fani Willis. The House Judiciary Committee recently Smith for a deposition about the federal prosecutions he brought against Trump during the Biden administration.We are a national leader in exposing the lawfare and abuse targeting Trump and other American citizens.In June 2025, we Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes for her communications with Smith ( (CV 2025-020674).In March 2025, we the Justice Department for details of any investigations, inquiries, or referrals concerning potential misconduct of any person working for Smith ( (No. 1:25-cv-00801)).Also in March, Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis to turn over 212 pages of records to a state court judge. His misconduct began at the Federal Air Marshal Training Center in New Jersey where he simulated shooting a female instructor in the head, kicked her during training, pulled her hair and told women “You don’t belong here,” according to documents provided to Judicial Watch by the Air Marshal National Council. Potapov was suspended and involuntarily transferred to the Philadelphia Field Office before being promoted to help lead the Insider Threat Unit, which got blasted in a DHS audit for its many failures during his leadership. An agency insider told Judicial Watch Potapov helped build a unit later condemned as structurally broken. Yet in 2020 he was promoted to Assistant Special Agent in Charge in Washington D.C. where he helped create a special that pulled air marshals off high-risk flights so members of Congress could get extra protection on flights that did not meet the threat criteria, usually determined by the FBI, for air marshals. In 2021 Judicial Watch exposed the program, reporting that FAMS were yanked from a high-risk flight so California Congresswoman Maxine Waters could have extra security during a trip to Minnesota though she was already covered by a four-man detail consisting of two Capitol Police officers and two Secret Service agents. The story led to the program’s elimination, DHS sources confirmed.After launching the outrageous VIP Congressional Concierge, Potapov was promoted to executive director of flight operations, which oversaw another scandal-plagued program called Quiet Skies that secretly surveilled Americans on flights in the name of preventing terrorism. Hundreds of Americans, including then Hawaii Congresswoman Gabbard, were put on a watchlist and deemed threats to national security for holding political views against the Biden administration. In fact, Gabbard was added to the Quiet Skies program on July 23, 2024, one day after she criticized the Biden administration in an interview. The Trump administration ended the Quiet Skies program over the summer and in the fall a confirmed the Biden administration weaponized the watch list against everyday Americans, deeming them threats to national security simply for holding opposing political views. As Executive Director of Flight Operations in 2023, Potapov oversaw Quiet Skies and all global FAMS deployments, making him a strange choice to help lead the agency.In an internal memo announcing Potapov as his number two guy, FAMS Director Brian C. Belcher fails to mention his sordid past, instead promoting him as a 23-year FAMS veteran who has demonstrated “exceptional leadership and dedication to our mission of safeguarding the nation’s transportation system.” Belcher also praises Potapov’s expertise and commitment to operational excellence that make him uniquely qualified to serve in this leadership position. The reality is much different, says David Londo, president of the Air Marshal National Council, who says many inside the agency are outraged. “His career provides a clear example of systemic breakdowns in federal accountability, leadership vetting, and taxpayer stewardship,” Londo said, pointing to Potapov’s court-confirmed misconduct, failures documented in federal audits, warnings from a congressional investigative unit and widespread internal concerns.Until next week, | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C) 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved | | |

subject: BREAKING: Indiana House passes a gerrymandered map

body:
Indiana Republicans are leading our country down a dark and dangerous path.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120706105/587100759/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2M2ZjMTQxLTI5ZDItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MFvnVidf5H3OXewxBtMd3omakMak0OFvaTxmc6o4Mio=&emci=0430cf95-1fd2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=963fc141-29d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Indiana House Republicans just passed one of the most egregiously gerrymandered maps in the country — on par with the maps North Carolina and Texas passed earlier this year. Make no mistake: These lawmakers did this at the direction of the very same players in Washington who continue to stoke violent threats against their colleagues in the Indiana Senate; just as they did to Vice President Mike Pence on January 6th. These Republicans are ignoring the overwhelming opposition among their own constituents to a mid-decade gerrymander. **These Republicans are leading Indiana and our country down a dark and dangerous path — this gerrymander and the unacceptable threats of violence from those supporting it don’t represent the people of Indiana. ** [**This fight isn’t over — this mid-decade gerrymander now goes to the Indiana Senate. Rush in your donation to help the NDRC fight back in Indiana and in every state where Republicans are attempting to gerrymander in order to rig the midterm elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120706106/587100760/-1027206931?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_IndianaRR_email_20251205-NDRC-Tier1-IndianaRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251205-NDRC-Tier1-IndianaRR_&utm_campaign=IndianaRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2M2ZjMTQxLTI5ZDItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MFvnVidf5H3OXewxBtMd3omakMak0OFvaTxmc6o4Mio=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The map the House just passed would deal a devastating blow to fair representation. It carves up Indianapolis into four districts, splits the Lake Michigan shoreline in two, and targets college towns **— all to try to dilute the voices of certain voters and rig the 2026 midterm elections before voters can cast a ballot. **
Let’s be clear: This comes at the behest of Donald Trump, who threatened to help primary any Indiana Republican who didn’t support this gerrymander and attacked Indiana Governor Mike Braun on Truth Social. Meanwhile, some lawmakers received threats of violence, including bomb threats to their homes.
**Nobody should be able to threaten and intimidate lawmakers and get their way, especially when they seek to deprive people of the power of their votes. We can stop Trump’s redistricting crisis from spreading, but it’ll take enormous resources.**
[**Donate to help scale our work for this fight in Indiana and wherever map manipulators target next — and let’s preserve our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120706113/587100767/-1027206931?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_IndianaRR_email_20251205-NDRC-Tier1-IndianaRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251205-NDRC-Tier1-IndianaRR_&utm_campaign=IndianaRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2M2ZjMTQxLTI5ZDItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MFvnVidf5H3OXewxBtMd3omakMak0OFvaTxmc6o4Mio=)

Team: We're counting on 10,000 Democrats to activate their memberships before 2025 comes to a close -- **but our records show yours is currently inactive!**

We protected abortion rights in Michigan. Republicans want to take that away. |

Republicans here in Michigan have just proposed a bill to start tracking abortion data, including deeply personal information like marital status. It’s their latest attempt to create barriers to abortion care, and it’s part of their plan to ban abortion in Michigan and across the country. Here’s the background: Michigan used to have invasive reporting requirements like these on the books, **until Governor Whitmer repealed them by signing the _Reproductive Health Act_.** But now Republicans are trying to claw back those protections. **[We can’t let that happen. name: Team McBride
subject: Trans lives are not a political weapon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
MAGA extremists are targeting trans folks. Please help Sarah fight back by making your voice heard.
#
Hi there,
We’re reaching out because the recent escalation in anti-trans rhetoric we’re seeing in Congress is dangerous. And Sarah needs you to stand in solidarity with her and speak out against this cruelty today.
[**Will you add your name and join Sarah’s call to stop members of Congress from demonizing and scapegoating the transgender community?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/sign/em-20251205-anti-trans-rhetoric?source=em20251205-2565&t=1&akid=2565%2E21716%2EYTol5w)
**[Sign On »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/sign/em-20251205-anti-trans-rhetoric?source=em20251205-2565&t=2&akid=2565%2E21716%2EYTol5w)**
In recent months, some members of Congress have spread dehumanizing rhetoric about transgender people. We’ve heard calls to _institutionalize_ all trans people, and that trans folks are “ _mentally ill_ ” or even a “ _national security threat_.” Some use anti-trans slurs regularly.
Sarah’s faced this rhetoric up close in Congress — but this is so much bigger than just one person. This is about the real harm this hate unleashes. **It fuels violence, discrimination, and unbearable fear, and let’s be clear: Republican politicians know exactly what they’re doing.**
Republicans in Congress are scapegoating trans people and other vulnerable groups because they have no real solutions for health care, child care, housing, groceries, and every other issue Americans are _actually_ facing. Instead of doing their jobs, they manufacture culture wars to push trans people out of public life and shun anyone who doesn’t fit their narrow box of what’s “acceptable.”
**That’s why we have to say clearly and proudly what we stand for, and it’s why Sarah and Rep. Mark Takano led more than 200 Democrats in calling on Speaker Mike Johnson to enforce _basic standards of decency_ and stop this hateful rhetoric in Congress.**
**Now, Sarah needs you to raise your voice too.[If you’re ready to stand in solidarity with Sarah and transgender people everywhere, add your name now to tell MAGA politicians: Stop spreading hateful and violent lies about trans people.](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/sign/em-20251205-anti-trans-rhetoric?source=em20251205-2565&t=3&akid=2565%2E21716%2EYTol5w)**
**[Sign On »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/sign/em-20251205-anti-trans-rhetoric?source=em20251205-2565&t=4&akid=2565%2E21716%2EYTol5w)**
Thank you for making your voice heard. Together, we’ll show that true patriotism means standing up to bullies, giving vulnerable people a hand instead of punching down on them, and recognizing dignity and humanity in every single person — especially when some try to erase it.
In solidarity,
— Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251205-1&t=5&refcode2=2565_21716_YTol5w&akid=2565%2E21716%2EYTol5w)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=6&akid=2565%2E21716%2EYTol5w)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=7&akid=2565%2E21716%2EYTol5w)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2565%2E21716%2EYTol5w)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

subject: TOMORROW!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/TxGynGz3LGN2jMGE8ejnPw~~/AAPPABA~/raTOuGMapp2nvjI6Oec581BNPkAHQ0yh1bL4nsQmg6f2R7GKMXyvzNT5nXgVLYVqtSPUjuAJWKQ_YrHPq-powzF5lP65a1eHxssqeeYVPGmlywc8c0mZQASSN61BYkQUKoG_jputlznLK6jv07aXK31tABOUJB36knUpJWRd8EYgeQXXcEsVI_EVED0XukX_4I-5Nl6hRcWJxYpQFCnGWSEu2hSLSbQZYMEOiEnMG13FKKmpnu0uAn6r8g7iuHeFoPDqWo6CTfsXStAo9Vcp5m_yBOwS0dFc-g4IVfUXitOMO1YfGFFJKzM8XikqFvEWUqTYR-08S5DP3zciAB416naTxrhdqRNHS2bTSN02Lm0~)
---
| Peter, I’m sooo hyped! MadSoul Fest is TOMORROW!!!!

But before then, I had to reach out one more time to thank you.

Because of people like you who stay engaged and believe in our youth-powered movement, we’re changing the way to organize and reach young people. No one is doing it like us, and I can’t thank you enough for being a part of this team.

**Because of you, we’re going to register HUNDREDS of young, first-time voters and inspire the next generation to get involved in our movement for change.**

But the organizing doesn’t end after MadSoul. My team is organizing across Florida _year-round_ , and we can’t keep out-organizing the fascists who want us on the sidelines without your support.

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: This is our moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251205-884&t=1&akid=885%2E294397%2E8QoOjA)
Good afternoon, team. 🌅
We’re about to kick off our first weekend since nomination papers dropped, and our team is hitting the ground early to gather the signatures we need to put Judge Chris Taylor on the ballot.
[**Could you pitch in a few bucks to fuel our campaign? We’ll explain more later on why earning your support right now is important.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251205_1_ak.7hj0b5&amount=10&refcode=em20251205-884&t=3&akid=885%2E294397%2E8QoOjA)
This is our moment to showcase our strength, build our presence statewide, and prove we’re ready to take on the far-right special interests backing Maria Lazar.
It’s also a historically slower time for campaigns. With the holiday season in full swing, people pay less attention to their inboxes, and as a result, grassroots fundraising tends to drop off.
**But field work like this takes ample resources — clipboards, materials, volunteer coordination, and the organizing power to reach communities all across Wisconsin.**
Your support today helps fuel the work happening in real time to move us one step closer to electing Judge Chris Taylor to the Wisconsin Supreme Court next April.
[**If you can, chip in $10 or whatever works for you this morning to boost our campaign:**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251205_1_ak.7hj0b5&amount=10&refcode=em20251205-884&t=4&akid=885%2E294397%2E8QoOjA)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251205_1_ak.7hj0b5&amount=10&refcode=em20251205-884&t=23&akid=885%2E294397%2E8QoOjA)**
Thanks for powering this movement,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251205-884&t=24&refcode2=885_294397_8QoOjA&akid=885%2E294397%2E8QoOjA)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=885%2E294397%2E8QoOjA)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=885%2E294397%2E8QoOjA)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)
Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

body:
The Hollywood Money Machine Is Awake | Peter,

You want to know how desperate the Left is to claw their way back into power?

**HOLLYWOOD just launched a full-blown rescue mission for Sherrod Brown.**

I'm talking: studio bosses, mega-agents, movie producers - the whole woke A-list - tripping over themselves to cut $10,000 checks so they can BUY another Senate seat.

These people don't give a damn about Ohio.
They don't care about workers.
They sure as hell don't care about America.

_They want power.
They want control.
And they want Republicans OUT of the Senate in 2026._

This is the Left's game plan - flood red states with coastal cash and hope you're too busy living real life to notice.

Well, we noticed.

clean_body: The Hollywood Money Machine Is Awake | Peter, You want to know how desperate the Left is to claw their way back into power? HOLLYWOOD just launched a full-blown rescue mission for Sherrod Brown. I'm talking: studio bosses, mega-agents, movie producers - the whole woke A-list - tripping over themselves to cut $10,000 checks so they can BUY another Senate seat. These people don't give a damn about Ohio. They don't care about workers. They sure as hell don't care about America. They want power. They want control. And they want Republicans OUT of the Senate in 2026. This is the Left's game plan - flood red states with coastal cash and hope you're too busy living real life to notice. Well, we noticed. My father needs a filibuster-proof majority in the Senate. I need you in this fight with me: Let's show these Hollywood elites that REAL America still decides elections - not a handful of bored celebrities in Beverly Hills. Let's crush this. Your name rose straight to the top. ** That’s why I’m personally inviting you to become a Charter Member of my 47th President Founders Club. Only 4,700 spots exist in the entire country. I’m holding one for you! Don’t miss your shot to stand with the patriots who made the greatest comeback in American history. Your name could be one of them. I am counting on you. Don’t let me down. Thank you and God bless you, President Trump | | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. clean_body: ...but I’ve got a plan to straighten it out. | | | | | | | | Friend, Well, we filed the discharge petition to ban insider trading by members of Congress this week. I hear this is one of the highest-polling pieces of bipartisan legislation in history—but not all of my colleagues are on board. I wonder why? We aren’t slowing down, though! Some Senate Democrats want to gut my bill to defund the dadgum Taliban. Not on my watch. These terrorists will hate us for free—and the buck stops here. Forty million dollars of your tax money is funneled to the Taliban every week. Folks, that’s just the tip of the waste, fraud and abuse iceberg in our federal government. So, with Marjorie heading home to Georgia, I’ve officially put my name in the hat to be the next chairman of the DOGE Subcommittee. It’s a long shot—I don’t have the money to buy a chairmanship—but I’d love to get in there and actually start making some changes. Thank y’all for sending me here, Tim | | Join the conservative movement! Chip in to help us pave the way for a solid Republican agenda. | | | Stay in Touch 👇 Paid for by Burchett for Congress | | | ---|---|---
