name: Deb Haaland
subject: Hey it’s Deb – let me tell you why I love to cook
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
Cooking has always been a way for me to foster connection and build community.

| | |
---
Hey there – it’s Deb.
One thing you should know about me is that**I love to cook.**
My love of cooking New Mexican cuisine started early, thanks to the hours I spent watching my grandmother bake bread in her mud oven and stir huge pots of posole. She wouldn’t let us kids in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours. I still hold those memories close as I prepare my favorite traditional New Mexican dishes.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1408?t=1&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf) _New Mexico chiles – the best in the world!_
**There’s something powerful about connecting with others over a home cooked meal.** When I was in law school at UNM, I’d make chicken green chile stew for student gatherings, and I made that same dish for my Congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season. I even cooked chile and tortillas for the water protectors when I traveled to Standing Rock during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline.
Cooking became more than a hobby after I decided to start my own salsa business. I worked out of a commercial kitchen and bought my red chile pequin from a farm in northern New Mexico. I’d prepare my salsa and deliver jars to mom-and-pop shops across the state, often with my child Somáh riding with me in the back seat.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1408?t=2&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf) _Here’s Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa. Kids in New Mexico start early... 🌶️_
**For me, cooking has always been a way to foster connection and build community, which is exactly what we’re doing now as we grow our campaign for New Mexico.** I’ve had the chance to sit down with New Mexicans in living rooms and at kitchen tables to hear about their lives, their struggles, and their hopes for the future. Every conversation is another reminder of the incredibly high stakes in this race – and proof that if we organize around our shared values, we win.
[**Will you donate $5 to power our grassroots campaign? If you donate through this link, I’ll even send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole – one of my favorite dishes to make during the holiday season!**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1408?t=3&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1409?t=4&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf)
---
| | [Donate $35](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1410?t=5&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1411?t=6&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1408?t=7&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf)
---
Happy cooking,

Deb 🌶️
P.S. Throughout my life, cooking has helped me bring my community together – and bringing people together is exactly how we’ll win this campaign. [**If you make a donation of any amount through this link, I’ll be sure to send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole so you can cook it for your friends and family.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1408?t=8&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf)
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1412?t=9&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?t=10&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=11&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=12&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=13&akid=6069%2E400544%2EAibhHf)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com
**PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**

body:
I want you to know this
| | |

Shabbat Shalom, friend.
My husband, Larry, and I are about to sit down for Shabbat dinner, but I wanted to share something with you before logging off.
**I’ve always been guided by the Jewish principle of “Tikkun Olam” – acting with kindness to repair the world. That hasn’t changed just because President Trump and the GOP are making it harder.**
Like you, I couldn’t be more concerned about what’s being done to make the lives of hardworking Americans worse. But I know that we can still build a better tomorrow for our kids and future generations if we stand together now.
That’s why I want you to know what a blessing it is to have you on my team, friend. When Democrats take back the Senate and repair the damage from Trump’s time in office – it will be thanks to dedicated people like YOU standing with us at this critical time.

It’s clear — Maine is ready for change. We’ve gained incredible momentum in a short time and it’s critical that we stay on track. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Netflix
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Antitrust laws MUST be enforced to protect consumers, workers, and free speech.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2724%2E4032634%2EYh02j7)
---
Since I sent you my last note about the dangers of mega-media mergers three weeks ago, we got a new development today: **Netflix** won the bidding war to buy **Warner Brothers** — including its film and TV studios, HBO, and HBO Max — in what looks like an **anti-monopoly nightmare.** This merger would create one massive media giant with control of almost half of the subscriber streaming market — owning movies and shows like: White Lotus, Love is Blind, Stranger Things, Succession, Squid Games, The Sopranos, Wednesday, Euphoria, Game of Thrones, The Big Bang Theory, The DC Universe, Lord of the Rings, Harry Potter, The Last of Us, Sex and the City, Every Turner Classic Movie, Bridgerton, The Circle, The Wire, Veep, Curb Your Enthusiasm, The Crown, Narcos ...and so much more. This could force Americans into higher subscription prices and fewer choices over what and how they watch, while putting American workers at risk. But this fight is far from over. It’s obvious by now that, under Donald Trump, the antitrust review process has become a cesspool of political favoritism and corruption. But the Justice Department must enforce our nation’s anti-monopoly laws fairly and transparently — not use the Warner Bros. deal review to invite influence-peddling and bribery. [**The consolidation of our media landscape is bad for the consumer and for our democracy. I’m going to keep fighting to make sure our antitrust laws are properly enforced so you don’t have to pay an arm and a leg to watch your favorite movie or show. If you’re able, chip in to fuel our fight to take on this kind of monopolization running rampant under Donald Trump.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3277?t=8&akid=2724%2E4032634%2EYh02j7)

Hi, team, it's Senator LBR. I only have a few minutes while I'm in between meetings, but I wanted to reach out to you about something important.

Yesterday, I introduced a bill alongside Senate Democrats that would **renew premium tax credits for 3 years, extend the 2026 Open Enrollment period, reduce unnecessary paperwork for families, and lower out-of-pocket caps. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120708493/587108956/-486912179?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.05_ACA-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzdiOWMwNy0zM2QyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2AVwByl7qlY1oAfT3k9Dfb0VruzILvI0gSs1k73UnSg=) This bill will help keep healthcare costs from DOUBLING for some Americans, _but only if it's passed._

Right now, Republicans have the Senate Majority. Which means that any legislation, even lifesaving legislation like this, could fail if they don't get on board.

**_And frankly, I'm sick and tired of hoping MAGA Republicans come around and do the right thing for the American people._** **[**That's why my team and I are racing to raise $5,000 from this email to help us flip the Senate blue. We have a golden opportunity to take back the Senate from Trump's Republicans in 2026, but it's going to be a brutal endeavor. name: Pete Maysmith, LCV
subject: Reflections from Pete: Finding Hope in Times of Darkness
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMyNTg2MTUS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjM2MDA1NjgyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter, One of my favorite things ever is being outside on a beautiful fall day. A lot
of the work we do is outside: we organize in communities, we advocate for our
issues and candidates door-to-door — all so we can protect and enjoy nature,
clean water, and clean air. I take advantage of our awesome public lands whenever I can. I spent some of
Thanksgiving outside running with my wife and then exploring with our young
daughter and lots of other family. In that spirit, I am so grateful for everyone
in the Conservation Voters Movement. The people I work with are talented and
passionate about this work individually, and together, we’re much greater than
the sum of our parts. There’s so many things we’re damn good at. You stepped up for Giving Tuesday, Peter, and I’m also grateful for
your support. Thanks to supporters like you, we met our goal for Giving Tuesday,
which will make a difference well into next year. And now, with 2025 coming to a close, I’ve been doing a lot of reflecting on the
work we’ve done this year, and the things still left to accomplish. One moment that stands out for me is being in Virginia the day before Election
Day, when I met up with an amazing group of folks working to turn out voters. We
proved that when we meet voters where they are — talking about how everything is
too expensive and the role clean energy plays in battling high energy bills — we
win. When we innovate and apply what we’ve learned, we win. And none of this
would be possible without supporters like you. Thank you. I think about the LCV annual staff retreat we held in September. Early one
morning before we began our day, I walked out on a little pier just before
sunrise. One of the organizers on our team (a fellow early bird) was also there,
and we stood and watched the sun come up over the water together. We are in a deeply unsettling time. Energy prices are skyrocketing due to the
Trump administration’s corruption and stacking the deck for fossil fuels. The
government shutdown ended without a real resolution, and the constant assaults
on nature and our democracy continue to keep me up at night. Sure, something as simple as watching a pretty sunrise over water doesn't make
our world a better place, but at that moment I kept coming back to this: we need
hope. Hope is what fuels us spiritually as people. We have to believe better
days are ahead. And that sunrise, with a Conservation Voters Movement full of
smart, passionate people doing fantastic work thanks to supporters like you,
gave me hope. Like many environmental organizations, we’re always looking for ways to do
better, but we also know how to do a lot of things really well, and in the
midst of daunting and dark times, we can bring the light forward. Not just
individually, but because of what we do together, as an organization and as the
Conservation Voters Movement. What gives me hope is that we’re in this together, Peter. And we
couldn’t do it without you. With fierce commitment, Pete Maysmith

President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13258615&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM2MDA1NjgyNgS2&spReportId=MjM2MDA1NjgyNgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13258615&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM2MDA1NjgyNgS2&spReportId=MjM2MDA1NjgyNgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f3g0P-h~

Peter ,
Thirty Republicans in Congress just announced they’re not coming back in 2026.
This is what happens when incumbents see shifting numbers, shrinking margins, and a political map that suddenly looks a lot less safe for the party in power.
For Democrats, this creates real, concrete opportunities: Open seats. No entrenched incumbents. Competitive primaries.
So we're asking directly: will you chip in to help GOTV PAC launch programs in these newly-open districts and build a real Democratic path to expanding the House map? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12052025]
Chip in $25 to power GOTV PAC → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12052025]
If we do this right, 2026 won’t just be another midterm. It’ll be the year Democrats prove that even the deepest red seats aren’t as “safe” as Republicans want everyone to believe.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

clean_body: I saved YOU the very last spot on the 2025 MAGA Honor Roll | | | | I have ONE spot left on the official 2025 MAGA Honor Roll ... and I’m holding it for YOU. Your name has come across my desk over and over this year — more than once, more than twice — which is exactly why I told my team: “Save the final spot for Fellow American do NOT give it to anyone else.” I’m personally compiling the permanent 2025 MAGA Honor Roll , the exclusive list of my strongest, most loyal patriots from this historic year. This list is going straight to my desk in the Oval Office. I will be reviewing every single name myself tonight. Please don’t make me stay up all night wondering why you weren’t there when I looked for you. Thank you, President Donald J. Trump P.S. When I don’t see your name tonight, I’ll know you let the last spot go to someone else. Don’t do that to me. Confirm now and make my night. | | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: David Hogg
subject: Bernie Sanders endorsed Randy Villegas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is big news in one of the most flippable districts in the country.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251205-1&t=1&akid=2908%2E587540%2E0pGN_D)
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251205_1_randy.Rp-4Gk&refcode=em20251205-2908&amount=5&t=2&akid=2908%2E587540%2E0pGN_D)
Peter, big news about one of our endorsed candidates:
**Senator Bernie Sanders just endorsed Randy Villegas, a young progressive running in one of the most flippable districts in the country!**
Randy is running to serve his home: California’s Central Valley. He grew up on Medicaid, food assistance, and school lunches — the very programs Republicans like his opponent, David Valadao, have gutted.
Randy’s mom used to tell him, “Tell me who you’re with, and I’ll tell you who you are.” That’s why Randy is refusing corporate checks — because he’s with _us._
His campaign is about fighting to lower costs, deliver Medicare for All, and protect the rights of his neighbors in the Valley. And we’re with him all the way.
**[Will you split a donation now between Randy’s campaign and Leaders We Deserve? Together we can elect Randy and other young leaders like him.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251205_1_randy.Rp-4Gk&refcode=em20251205-2908&amount=5&t=3&akid=2908%2E587540%2E0pGN_D)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251205_1_randy.Rp-4Gk&amount=5&refcode=em20251205-2908&t=22&akid=2908%2E587540%2E0pGN_D)**
Thank you,
David

name: Katie Porter
subject: We are tied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40535%2E3422442%2EZXNqRg)
Hi Peter,
I’ll get straight to the point: **A new poll is out that shows our campaign in a statistical tie for first place** in this race. And two of the candidates we are in a dead heat with are Republicans.
We’ve warned in the past about Republicans gaining ground, but this is different. Now, both Republicans are in a position where they could take the lead—especially with the support they get from far-right billionaires and corporations.
But here’s the part that I’m worried about: In California’s primary system, the top two vote getters advance to the general election regardless of party. **That means we could be looking at the general election coming down to two Republicans.**
I’m running to make sure neither of these Trump-aligned extremists become our next governor. I’m rejecting corporate money to build a people-powered movement that can take on the special interests and win. But right now our campaign needs supporters like you to have our backs so we can stay competitive.
**[Peter, can you donate $5 today so we can scale up our campaign fast and make sure Republicans don’t flip California red?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251205_1_ak.W1vebY&refcode=em20251205-40535&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40535%2E3422442%2EZXNqRg)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251205_1_ak.W1vebY&refcode=em20251205-40535&t=22&akid=40535%2E3422442%2EZXNqRg)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251205-40535&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40535_3422442_ZXNqRg&akid=40535%2E3422442%2EZXNqRg)**

The GOP House majority is currently razor‐thin: 220 Republicans to 213 Democrats. If Republicans win the special election here in Georgia, they'd cement their grip on power -- and give MAGA allies another powerful vote in Congress. **But if we flip GA‐14 -- or even force a runoff -- we deal a serious blow to their control, and show the country that even "red" districts can change when it matters.** Nationally, Democrats are showing momentum. Democrats swept into office in Virginia and New Jersey. A Tennessee district just swung away from the MAGA Republicans by double digits. And two recent special election wins in Georgia -- for statewide offices -- proved voters are ready for change. **_Now it 's our turn._** That's why my campaign is already working around the clock: staffing up, running ads, making phone calls. But we're behind our fundraising target -- and we cannot sustain this effort without your help. [**If you 're able, now is when we need your support the most. clean_body: | | Hi, it's Shawn Harris -- the Democrat and combat veteran running in the GA‐14 special election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene. | The GOP House majority is currently razor‐thin: 220 Republicans to 213 Democrats. If Republicans win the special election here in Georgia, they'd cement their grip on power -- and give MAGA allies another powerful vote in Congress. But if we flip GA‐14 -- or even force a runoff -- we deal a serious blow to their control, and show the country that even "red" districts can change when it matters. Nationally, Democrats are showing momentum. Democrats swept into office in Virginia and New Jersey. A Tennessee district just swung away from the MAGA Republicans by double digits. And two recent special election wins in Georgia -- for statewide offices -- proved voters are ready for change. Now it 's our turn. That's why my campaign is already working around the clock: staffing up, running ads, making phone calls. But we're behind our fundraising target -- and we cannot sustain this effort without your help. ~~ ~~ ~~ This is more than a campaign. It 's a chance to restore honor, integrity, and dignity to Georgia's representation in Congress. It's our moment to show the nation that GA‐14 deserves real leadership -- not chaos. Thank you, Shawn Harris | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

Patriot,

A lot of talk online about division among Republicans. Like many things, Charlie Kirk was ahead of his time and knew how to create a political coalition.

Charlie Kirk’s entire M.O. was “The Movement before Me.”

He lived by it.

It wasn’t a self-personality cult. Everything he did was to build something for the America First movement, not for himself.

He gave his life to that.

**To honor his vision of keeping the White House in 2028 and keeping America First in power, Turning Point PAC is targeting key battleground states in 2026 to build the groundwork for victory.**

We have a proven formula of ballot chasing that works.

It worked in 2024.

And it will work again in 2026, 2028, and beyond.

I am calling on your immediate support to expand Turning Point PAC’s ballot-chasing operations in 2026.

We have an ambitious plan, but _**we must raise $100,000 before the new year**_.

[Patriot, can you please send an urgent donation of $26, $100, $250, or even chip in $10 or ANY amount today?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17831370/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYi1hY3Rpb24v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMDU/LbmNsQUJsRjRaTg/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10cDI1MTEwOCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwMTNfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRleHRfbGluazE/gaTNwew/s4s3a94f2f1)

Your support will fund ballot chasers in states that will determine the next President of the United States, such as Arizona, New Hampshire, and Nevada.

If we fail, you are looking at Gavin Newsom destroying our nation like he destroyed California.

[Please send your urgent support today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17831370/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYi1hY3Rpb24v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMDU/LbmNsQUJsRjRaTg/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10cDI1MTEwOCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIwMTNfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRleHRfbGluazI/gaTNwew/sel83d166ad)

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23700%2E4449941%2Ev2oN3E) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23700%2E4449941%2Ev2oN3E) **Donald Trump is SO mad!!**

[Our hero – Senator Amy Klobuchar – just introduced an](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70676?t=3&akid=23700%2E4449941%2Ev2oN3E) [AMAZING bill that would automatically register all eligible U.S. Citizens to vote!!! ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70677?t=4&akid=23700%2E4449941%2Ev2oN3E) [ **Sign our MASSIVE petition now to demand Congress pass the _Register America to Vote Act_ and SAVE our right to vote >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70676?t=5&akid=23700%2E4449941%2Ev2oN3E)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70676?t=6&akid=23700%2E4449941%2Ev2oN3E)

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70676?t=8&akid=23700%2E4449941%2Ev2oN3E)
**We still need [11,294] more signatures from your area to hit our goal.**

Listen, the _Register America to Vote Act_ is a monumental step towards protecting Voting Rights in America!

**It’s on ALL of us to make sure every voter can reach the ballot box without barriers.** [**Passing this legislation is the first step.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70676?t=9&akid=23700%2E4449941%2Ev2oN3E)

This bill would give ALL Americans an equal opportunity to use their voice in our democracy...but Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are already doing everything they can to SHUT IT DOWN!!

[**_They know that higher voter turnout means that they would never win another election again._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70676?t=10&akid=23700%2E4449941%2Ev2oN3E)

We cannot let Senator Klobuchar's bill fall through the cracks. **So we’re launching an URGENT 24-hour petition to gather MASSIVE support!**
[ **Sign our MASSIVE petition now to demand Congress pass the _Register America to Vote Act_ and SAVE our right to vote >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70676?t=11&akid=23700%2E4449941%2Ev2oN3E)

_Please, scroll back up and add your name._

Counting on you,

Fight For Reform

| | Peter,The holiday season marks an annual opportunity to show our gratitude for the many blessings in life. For some, this means donating to a cause or providing resources to support the collective well being of our community. During this year’s holiday giving season, I hope you’ll consider pitching in to my re-elect campaign by RSVPing to my Jingle & Mingle Holiday Party on Monday, December 8th from 5pm-7pm.
